# Startup (run this first)
## Reading in libraries, setting up, reading in data
```{r}
library(plyr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2) # used to make plots
library(cowplot) # used to make aesthetically beautiful plots, on Emerson's recommendation
library(ggpubr) # used to combine multiple ggplot objects for multipanel figures
library(nlme) # used to make linear mixed-effect models and perform associated functions
library(tidyr) # associated with gplot
library(MuMIn)
library(lme4) # used to make linear mixed-effect models, and perform associated functions (here, to extract R^2)
library(rsq) # used to extract R^2
library(car) 
library(dunn.test) # used for nonparametric comparison
library(rstatix) # used for nonparametric comparison
library(emmeans) # used for pairwise comparison test
library(ARTool) # used to conduct non-parametric ANOVA
library(gridExtra) # used to make multipanel figures from individual figures
library(MASS)
library(multcompView)
library(multcomp)
library(recolorize) # to read in the legend
library(rcompanion)

# Setting working directory

  setwd("/Users/emmadaily/BOSTON UNIVERSITY Dropbox/Emma Daily/Lab Files/Projects/UNE/Particulate Matter Project/Daily PM Analysis/RCode/LeafSEM/csvs")

# Reading In Leaf SEM Data

  LeafSEM <- read.csv("LeafSEM.csv")
  LeafSEM <- na.omit(LeafSEM)

  # Reading in info about the UNE Sites
  UNESites <- read.csv("UNE_Sites.csv")

  # Combining site info with SEM dataframe
  LeafSEMxUNESites <- left_join(LeafSEM,UNESites,by="UNE_site")

  # Ensuring that distance from edge and the categories are read as factors

  LeafSEMxUNESites$dfe<-as.factor(LeafSEMxUNESites$dfe)
  LeafSEMxUNESites$urb_cat_dist<-as.factor(LeafSEMxUNESites$urb_cat_dist)
  LeafSEMxUNESites$urb_cat_isa<-as.factor(LeafSEMxUNESites$urb_cat_isa)


# Reading in Foliar PM Data
  
  LeafPM <- read.csv("LeafPM.csv")
  LeafPM <- na.omit(LeafPM)

  # Combining site info with PM dataframe
  LeafPMxUNESites <- left_join(LeafPM,UNESites,by="UNE_site")

  # Narrowing down to Period 2

  LeafPMxUNESitesP2 <- subset(LeafPMxUNESites,sample_period==2)

  # Ensuring that distance from edge is a categorical variable, and the rest are numeric

  LeafPMxUNESitesP2$dfe<-as.factor(LeafPMxUNESitesP2$dfe)
  LeafPMxUNESitesP2$urb_cat_dist <- as.factor(LeafPMxUNESitesP2$urb_cat_dist)
  LeafPMxUNESitesP2$urb_cat_isa <- as.factor(LeafPMxUNESitesP2$urb_cat_isa)

# Reading in Passive Sampler data (Edge and Interior Only)
  
  PassiveMass <- read.csv("Passive_Samplers.csv")
  PassiveMass <- subset(PassiveMass, dfe=="0"|dfe=="90")

  # Combining site info with passive mass dataframe
  PassiveMassxUNESites <- left_join(PassiveMass,UNESites,by="UNE_site")

  # Ensuring that distance from edge is a categorical variable, and the rest are numeric

  PassiveMassxUNESites$dfe<-as.factor(PassiveMassxUNESites$dfe)
  PassiveMassxUNESites$PM2.5 <- as.numeric(PassiveMassxUNESites$PM2.5)
  PassiveMassxUNESites$PM10 <- as.numeric(PassiveMassxUNESites$PM10)
  PassiveMassxUNESites$urb_cat_dist<-as.factor(PassiveMassxUNESites$urb_cat_dist)
  PassiveMassxUNESites$urb_cat_isa<-as.factor(PassiveMassxUNESites$urb_cat_isa)

# Subsetting all the response variables of interest

  leaf_resp_vars <- cbind(LeafSEMxUNESites$perc_occluded, 
                        LeafSEMxUNESites$perc_occluded_PM,
                        LeafSEMxUNESites$perc_occluded_hyphae,
                        LeafSEMxUNESites$perc_occluded_single.cell,
                        LeafSEMxUNESites$perc_occluded_other,
                        LeafSEMxUNESites$stomatal_density,
                        LeafSEMxUNESites$hyphal_conc,
                        LeafSEMxUNESites$single.cell_density,
                        LeafSEMxUNESites$wax,
                        LeafPMxUNESitesP2$PM2.5,
                        LeafPMxUNESitesP2$PM10,
                        PassiveMass$PM2.5,
                        PassiveMass$PM10)

  leaf_resp_vars <- as.data.frame(leaf_resp_vars)

  LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites <-  
    cbind(leaf_resp_vars,LeafSEMxUNESites$UNE_site,LeafSEMxUNESites$urb_cat_dist,LeafSEMxUNESites$urb_cat_isa,LeafSEMxUNESites$dfe,LeafSEMxUNESites$ISA,LeafSEMxUNESites$distance_to_boston)

  colnames(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites) <- c("perc_occluded",
                              "perc_occluded_PM",
                              "perc_occluded_hyphae",
                              "perc_occluded_single_cell",
                              "perc_occluded_other",
                              "stomatal_density",
                              "hyphal_conc",
                              "single_cell_density",
                              "wax",
                              "foliar_PM2.5",
                              "foliar_PM10", 
                              "ambient_PM2.5",
                              "ambient_PM10",
                              "site_name",
                              "urb_cat_dist",
                              "urb_cat_isa",
                              "dfe",
                              "ISA",
                              "distance_to_boston")
                             

  LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites <- as.data.frame(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites) # formatting the data as a data frame

  # ensuring that all the continuous variables are numeric
  LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$perc_occluded <- as.numeric(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$perc_occluded)
  LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$perc_occluded_PM <- as.numeric(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$perc_occluded_PM)
  LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$perc_occluded_hyphae <- as.numeric(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$perc_occluded_hyphae)
  LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$perc_occluded_single_cell <- as.numeric(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$perc_occluded_single_cell)
  LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$perc_occluded_other <- as.numeric(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$perc_occluded_other)
  LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$stomatal_density <- as.numeric(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$stomatal_density)
  LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$hyphal_conc <- as.numeric(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$hyphal_conc)
  LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$single_cell_density <- as.numeric(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$single_cell_density)
  LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$wax <- as.numeric(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$wax)
  LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$foliar_PM2.5 <- as.numeric(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$foliar_PM2.5)
  LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$foliar_PM10 <- as.numeric(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$foliar_PM10)
  LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$ambient_PM2.5 <- as.numeric(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$ambient_PM2.5)
  LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$ambient_PM10 <- as.numeric(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$ambient_PM10)
  LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$ISA <- as.numeric(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$ISA)
  LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$distance_to_boston <- as.numeric(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$distance_to_boston)
  
# Steve's function to calculate mean and standard error for variable of interest, which will be important for all these stats and figures

#   data_sum <- ddply(data, groupnames, .fun=summary_func,

#   data_sum <- rename(data_sum, c("mean" = varname))
#   return(data_sum)
# }

# updated version of this function
data_summary <- function(data, varname, groupnames){
  varname <- as.character(varname)

  data %>%
    dplyr::summarise(
      n = sum(!is.na(.data[[varname]])),
      mean_val = mean(.data[[varname]], na.rm = TRUE),
      sd_val = sd(.data[[varname]], na.rm = TRUE),
      .by = all_of(groupnames)
    ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      se = sd_val / sqrt(n)
    ) %>%
    dplyr::select(-sd_val, -n) %>%
    dplyr::rename(!!varname := mean_val)
}

# Emma's function to calculate std error
  stderr <- function(x){
    se = sd(x) / sqrt(length(x))
    print(se)
  }

# functions to format p- and R^2 values
  
    # helper to format p-values
    fmt_p <- function(p) {
      if (is.na(p)) return(NA_character_)
      if (p < 0.001) return("< 0.001")
      paste0("p = ", signif(p, 3))
    }
    
    # helper to format R^2
    fmt_r2 <- function(r2) {
      if (is.na(r2)) return(NA_character_)
      paste0("R\u00B2 = ", signif(r2, 3))   # \u00B2 is superscript 2
    }
    
# Emma's function to calculate the 95% confidence interval
ci95_median_boot <- function(x, conf = 0.95, R = 5000, na.rm = TRUE) {
  if (na.rm) x <- x[!is.na(x)]
  
  boot_medians <- replicate(R, {
    median(sample(x, replace = TRUE))
  })
  
  alpha <- 1 - conf
  lower <- quantile(boot_medians, alpha/2)
  upper <- quantile(boot_medians, 1 - alpha/2)
  
  return(c(
    median = median(x),
    lower = lower,
    upper = upper
  ))
}
    

# Reading in Passive Sampler data (Edge, Interior, and Open)

  PassiveMassOpenxUNESites$urb_cat_isa<-as.factor(PassiveMassOpenxUNESites$urb_cat_isa)
  
  # omitting NAs
  PassiveMassOpenxUNESites <- na.omit(PassiveMassOpenxUNESites)
```

## Transforming all LeafSEM variables to normalize them when possible
```{r}
# to figure out which transformation normalizes each variable, I referenced the "statistics" section of each variable under "categorical comparisons". This information is also available in the doc "2021_UNE_PM_SEM_Statistics_V1.docx."

# perc_occluded: log-transformed
LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$log_perc_occluded <- LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$perc_occluded + 0.00001

# perc_occluded_PM is normal while untransformed

# perc_occluded_hyphae: sqrt-transformed

LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$sqrt_perc_occluded_hyphae <- sqrt(ifelse(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$perc_occluded_hyphae == 0, 1, LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$perc_occluded_hyphae))

# perc_occluded_single_cell: not normal under any transformation

# perc_occluded_other: not normal under any transformation

# stomatal_density: normal while untransformed

# hyphal_conc: sqrt-transformed

LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$sqrt_hyphal_conc <- sqrt(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$hyphal_conc)

# singlecell_density: not normal under any transformation

# wax: not normal under any transformation

# foliar_PM2.5: log-transformed

LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$log_foliar_PM2.5 <- log10(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$foliar_PM2.5*10000)

# foliar_PM10: log-transformed

LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$log_foliar_PM10 <- log10(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$foliar_PM10*10000)

# ambient_PM2.5: log-transformed

LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$log_ambient_PM2.5 <- log10(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$ambient_PM2.5)

# ambient_PM10: not normal under any transformation

```


## Summarizing all LeafSEM variables by site and dfe
```{r}

# this creates a summary of each variable by site & dfe, and is used to compare this data to other data we have by site and dfe (Katie Atherton's microbial data, the foliar nutrient data, the NOx & O3 data)

leafSEM_pair_means <- cbind(
                          # leaf variables
                          aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$perc_occluded,list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$site_name,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=mean),
                          aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$perc_occluded,list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$site_name,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=stderr)[,3],
                          aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$log_perc_occluded,list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$site_name,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=mean)[,3],
                          aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$log_perc_occluded,list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$site_name,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=stderr)[,3],       
                          aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$perc_occluded_PM,list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$site_name,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=mean)[,3],
                          aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$perc_occluded_PM,list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$site_name,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=stderr)[,3],
                          aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$perc_occluded_hyphae,list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$site_name,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=mean)[,3],
                          aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$perc_occluded_hyphae,list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$site_name,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=stderr)[,3],
                          aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$sqrt_perc_occluded_hyphae,list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$site_name,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=mean)[,3],
                          aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$sqrt_perc_occluded_hyphae,list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$site_name,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=stderr)[,3],
                          aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$perc_occluded_single_cell,list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$site_name,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=mean)[,3],
                          aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$perc_occluded_single_cell,list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$site_name,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=stderr)[,3],
                          aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$perc_occluded_other,list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$site_name,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=mean)[,3],
                          aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$perc_occluded_other,list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$site_name,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=stderr)[,3],
                          aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$hyphal_conc,list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$site_name,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=mean)[,3],
                          aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$hyphal_conc,list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$site_name,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=stderr)[,3],
                          aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$sqrt_hyphal_conc,list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$site_name,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=mean)[,3],
                          aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$sqrt_hyphal_conc,list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$site_name,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=stderr)[,3],
                          aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$single_cell_density,list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$site_name,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=mean)[,3],
                          aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$single_cell_density,list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$site_name,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=stderr)[,3],
                          aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$stomatal_density,list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$site_name,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=mean)[,3],
                          aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$stomatal_density,list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$site_name,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=stderr)[,3],
                          aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$wax,list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$site_name,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=mean)[,3],
                          aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$wax,list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$site_name,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=stderr)[,3],
                          # foliar PM
                          aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$foliar_PM2.5,list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$site_name,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=mean)[,3],
                          aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$foliar_PM2.5,list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$site_name,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=stderr)[,3],
                          aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$log_foliar_PM2.5,list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$site_name,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=mean)[,3],
                          aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$log_foliar_PM2.5,list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$site_name,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=stderr)[,3],
                          aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$foliar_PM10,list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$site_name,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=mean)[,3],
                          aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$foliar_PM10,list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$site_name,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=stderr)[,3],
                          aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$log_foliar_PM10,list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$site_name,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=mean)[,3],
                          aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$log_foliar_PM10,list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$site_name,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=stderr)[,3],
                          # ambient PM
                          aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$ambient_PM2.5,list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$site_name,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=mean)[,3],
                          aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$ambient_PM2.5,list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$site_name,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=stderr)[,3],
                          aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$log_ambient_PM2.5,list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$site_name,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=mean)[,3],
                          aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$log_ambient_PM2.5,list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$site_name,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=stderr)[,3],
                          aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$ambient_PM10,list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$site_name,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=mean)[,3],
                          aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$ambient_PM10,list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$site_name,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=stderr)[,3],
                          aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$ISA,list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$site_name,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=mean)[,3],
                          aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$distance_to_boston,list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$site_name,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=mean)[,3])

  colnames(leafSEM_pair_means) <- c("site_code","dfe",
                               "mean_perc_occluded","se_perc_occluded",
                               "mean_log_perc_occluded","se_log_perc_occluded",
                               "mean_perc_occluded_PM","se_perc_occluded_PM",
                               "mean_perc_occluded_hyphae","se_perc_occluded_hyphae",
                               "mean_sqrt_perc_occluded_hyphae","se_sqrt_perc_occluded_hyphae",
                               "mean_perc_occluded_single_cell","se_perc_occluded_single_cell",
                               "mean_perc_occluded_other","se_perc_occluded_other", 
                               "mean_hyphal_conc","se_hyphal_conc",
                               "mean_sqrt_hyphal_conc","se_sqrt_hyphal_conc",
                               "mean_single_cell_density","se_single_cell_density",
                               "mean_stomatal_density", "se_stomatal_density",
                               "mean_wax","se_wax",
                               "mean_foliar_PM2.5","se_foliar_PM2.5",
                               "mean_log_foliar_PM2.5","se_log_foliar_PM2.5",
                               "mean_foliar_PM10","se_foliar_PM10",
                               "mean_log_foliar_PM10","se_log_foliar_PM10",
                               "mean_ambient_PM2.5","se_ambient_PM2.5",
                               "mean_log_ambient_PM2.5","se_log_ambient_PM2.5",
                               "mean_ambient_PM10","se_ambient_PM10",
                               "ISA","distance_to_boston")

# adding a column to match with other datasets later on 
  
leafSEM_pair_means$code <- paste(leafSEM_pair_means$site_code,leafSEM_pair_means$dfe)

```

## Creating two separate tables with LeafSEM variables untransformed & transformed
### For the summarized data
```{r}
# creating two separate dataframes, one with the untransformed variables and one with the transformed

# dataframe with untransformed variables (for graphing)
leafSEM_pair_means_unt <- leafSEM_pair_means[,c(1:2,41:43,3:4,7:8,9:10,13:14,15:16,17:18,21:22,23:24,25:26,27:28,31:32,35:36,39:40)]


# data with normalized/transformed variables (for statistics)
leafSEM_pair_means_normal <- as.data.frame(c(leafSEM_pair_means[,c(1:2,41:43,5:6,7:8,11:12)],
                               leafSEM_pair_means[,19:20],
                               leafSEM_pair_means[,23:24],
                               leafSEM_pair_means[,c(29:30,33:34,37:38)]))

# these are the variables that couldn't be transformed to be normal. I am making NA columns for them to add to the "normal" dataframe
leafSEM_pair_means_normal$mean_perc_occluded_single_cell <- NA
leafSEM_pair_means_normal$se_perc_occluded_single_cell <- NA
leafSEM_pair_means_normal$mean_perc_occluded_other <- NA
leafSEM_pair_means_normal$se_perc_occluded_other <- NA
leafSEM_pair_means_normal$mean_single_cell_density <- NA
leafSEM_pair_means_normal$se_single_cell_density <- NA
leafSEM_pair_means_normal$mean_wax <- NA
leafSEM_pair_means_normal$se_wax <- NA
leafSEM_pair_means_normal$mean_ambient_PM10 <- NA
leafSEM_pair_means_normal$se_ambient_PM10 <- NA

leafSEM_pair_means_normal <- leafSEM_pair_means_normal[,c(1:5,
                                                          6:11,
                                                          22:25,
                                                          12:13, 26:27,
                                                          14:15,
                                                          28:29,
                                                          16:21,30:31
                                                          )]

# adding a column for urban vs rural & %ISA

  # urb_cat_isa
  
      leafSEM_pair_means_normal$urb_cat_isa <- ifelse(leafSEM_pair_means_normal$site_code=="AA01"|leafSEM_pair_means_normal$site_code=="HW07"|leafSEM_pair_means_normal$site_code=="BM03"|leafSEM_pair_means_normal$site_code=="SW08","Urban","Rural")
      leafSEM_pair_means_unt$urb_cat_isa <- ifelse(leafSEM_pair_means_unt$site_code=="AA01"|leafSEM_pair_means_unt$site_code=="HW07"|leafSEM_pair_means_unt$site_code=="BM03"|leafSEM_pair_means_unt$site_code=="SW08","Urban","Rural")
  
  # urb_cat_dist
      
      leafSEM_pair_means_normal$urb_cat_dist <- ifelse(leafSEM_pair_means_normal$site_code=="AA01"|leafSEM_pair_means_normal$site_code=="HW07"|leafSEM_pair_means_normal$site_code=="BH02"|leafSEM_pair_means_normal$site_code=="SW08","Urban","Rural")
      leafSEM_pair_means_unt$urb_cat_dist <- ifelse(leafSEM_pair_means_unt$site_code=="AA01"|leafSEM_pair_means_unt$site_code=="HW07"|leafSEM_pair_means_unt$site_code=="BH02"|leafSEM_pair_means_unt$site_code=="SW08","Urban","Rural")    
      

# Creating a string with axes titles for each variable

leaf_varnames <- list(
 site_code = "UNE Site",
 dfe = "Distance from Edge  (m)",
 code = "code",
 mean_perc_occluded = "% Stomata Occluded",
 se_perc_occluded = "Standard Error of % Stomata Occluded",
 mean_perc_occluded_PM = "% Stomata Occluded by PM",
 se_perc_occluded_PM = "Standard Error of % Stomata Occluded by PM",
 mean_perc_occluded_hyphae = "% Stomata Occluded by Hyphae",
 se_perc_occluded_hyphae = "Standard Error of % Stomata Occluded by Hyphae",
 mean_perc_occluded_single_cell = "% Stomata Occluded by Single-Cell Microbes",
 se_perc_occluded_single_cell = "Standard Error of % Stomata Occluded by Single-Cell Microbes",
 mean_perc_occluded_other = "% Stomata Occluded by Other Matter",
 se_perc_occluded_other = "Standard Error of % Stomata Occluded by Other Matter",
 mean_hyphal_conc = expression(atop("Hyphae on Leaf Surface", "(mm hyphae mm"^-2* " leaf)")),
 se_hyphal_conc = "Standard Error of Hyphal Density",
 mean_single_cell_density = expression(atop("Single-Cell Microbes on Leaf Surface","(single-cell microbes (mm"^-2*" leaf)")),
 se_stomatal_density = "Standard Error of Single-Cell Microbe Density",
 mean_stomatal_density = expression("Stomatal Density (# stomata mm"^-2*" leaf)"),
 se_stomatal_density = "Standard Error of Stomatal Density",
 mean_wax = "Wax (Extent from 0-3)",
 se_wax = "Standard Error of Wax",
 mean_foliar_PM2.5 = expression("Foliar PM"[2.5]*" ("*mu*"g PM cm"^-2*" leaf)"),
 se_foliar_PM2.5 = "Standard Error of Foliar PM2.5",
 mean_foliar_PM10 = expression("Foliar PM"[10]*" ("*mu*"g PM cm"^-2*" leaf)"),
 se_foliar_PM10 = "Standard Error of Foliar PM10",
 mean_ambient_PM2.5 = expression("Ambient PM"[2.5]*" ("*mu*g*" "*m^-3*")"),
 se_ambient_PM2.5 = "Standard Error Ambient PM2.5",
 mean_ambient_PM10 = expression("Ambient PM"[10]*" ("*mu*g*" "*m^-3*")"),
 se_ambient_PM10 = "Standard Error Ambient PM10",
 urb_cat_isa = "Urbanization Category by % Impervious Surface Area"
                                    )
```

# Categorical Comparisons: Edge vs Interior, and Urban vs Rural (determined by both distance from Boston and %ISA)
## By Site
```{r}
    
# defining lists of variable names
    leaf_vars_unt <- names(leafSEM_unt) 
    leaf_vars_norm <- names(leafSEM_normal)
    
for (i in 1:13) {
  
    # defining variables
    leaf_var_unt <- leaf_vars_unt[i]
    leaf_var_norm <- leaf_vars_norm[i]
    varlabel <- leafSEMnames[[leaf_var_unt]]
    
    
  # Figures
    
    sum <- cbind(aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites[[leaf_var_unt]],list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$site_name,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=ci95_median_boot))
    sum <- as.matrix(sum)
    colnames(sum) <- c("site_name","dfe","var","lower","upper")
    sum <- as.data.frame(sum)
    sum$var <- as.numeric(sum$var)
    sum$lower     <- as.numeric(sum$lower)
    sum$upper     <- as.numeric(sum$upper)
    
    fig <-
      ggplot(data=sum,mapping=aes(x=site_name,y=var,col=dfe)) +
      scale_color_manual(values = c("grey","black")) +
      geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), size = 3) +
      geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), 
                    width = 0.2, 
                    position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
      labs(title = "",
           x = "UNE Site", 
           y = varlabel) +
      theme_minimal() +
      guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Distance\nFrom Edge (m)")) +
      theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
            panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
            axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),
            axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
            axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
            axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
            axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 15))
  
  # Printing
      
      # printing figure
      setwd("/Users/emmadaily/BOSTON UNIVERSITY Dropbox/Emma Daily/Lab Files/Projects/UNE/Particulate Matter Project/Daily PM Analysis/RCode/LeafSEM/Figures/Categorical/By Site")
      
      ggsave(paste(leaf_var_unt,"_sites.png"), plot = fig, width = 8,
        height = 4, bg = "white")
}    
```
## Parametric Analyses
### Parametric ANOVA
```{r}

###### Loop for parametric ANOVAs

    # Prepare output dataframe
    ANOVA <- data.frame(
      variable = character(),
      dfe = numeric(),
      urb_cat_isa = numeric(),
      int_isa = numeric(),
      urb_cat_dist = numeric(),
      int_dist = numeric(),
      "UrbanEdge_RuralEdge_dist" = numeric(),
      "RuralInterior_RuralEdge_dist" = numeric(),
      "UrbanInterior_RuralEdge_dist" = numeric(),
      "RuralInterior_UrbanEdge_dist" = numeric(),
      "UrbanInterior_UrbanEdge_dist" = numeric(),
      "UrbanInterior_RuralInterior_dist" = numeric(),
      "UrbanEdge_dist" = character(),
      "RuralInterior_dist"= character(),
      "UrbanInterior_dist"= character(),
      "RuralEdge_dist"= character(),
      "UrbanEdge_RuralEdge_isa" = numeric(),
      "RuralInterior_RuralEdge_isa" = numeric(),
      "UrbanInterior_RuralEdge_isa" = numeric(),
      "RuralInterior_UrbanEdge_isa" = numeric(),
      "UrbanInterior_UrbanEdge_isa" = numeric(),
      "UrbanInterior_RuralInterior_isa" = numeric(),
      "UrbanEdge_isa" = character(),
      "RuralInterior_isa"= character(),
      "UrbanInterior_isa"= character(),
      "RuralEdge_isa"= character(),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    
    LeafSEM_ANOVA <- list()
    LeafSEM_ANOVA_ISA <- list()
    
    for (v in leaf_vars_norm[1:13]) {
    
      # Get the variable column
      y <- leafSEM_normal[[v]]
    
      # If the variable is all NA, fill row with NAs
      if (all(is.na(y))) {
        ANOVA <- rbind(ANOVA, data.frame(
          variable = v,
          dfe = NA,
          urb_cat_isa = NA,
          int_isa = NA,
          urb_cat_dist = NA,
          int_dist = NA,
          UrbanEdge_RuralEdge_dist = NA,
          RuralInterior_RuralEdge_dist = NA,
          UrbanInterior_RuralEdge_dist = NA,
          RuralInterior_UrbanEdge_dist = NA,
          UrbanInterior_UrbanEdge_dist = NA,
          UrbanInterior_RuralInterior_dist = NA,
          UrbanEdge_dist = NA,
          RuralInterior_dist = NA,
          UrbanInterior_dist = NA,
          RuralEdge_dist = NA,
          UrbanEdge_RuralEdge_isa = NA,
          RuralInterior_RuralEdge_isa = NA,
          UrbanInterior_RuralEdge_isa = NA,
          RuralInterior_UrbanEdge_isa = NA,
          UrbanInterior_UrbanEdge_isa = NA,
          UrbanInterior_RuralInterior_isa = NA,
          UrbanEdge_isa = NA,
          RuralInterior_isa = NA,
          UrbanInterior_isa = NA,
          RuralEdge_isa = NA
        ))
        next
      }
      
      # ANOVAS
      
        # ISA ANOVA
      
        formula_isa <- as.formula(paste(v, "~ dfe"))
        fit_isa <- aov(formula_isa, data = leafSEM_normal)
        e_isa <- summary(fit_isa)[[1]]
      
        formula_isa <- as.formula(paste(v, "~ urb_cat_isa"))
        fit_isa <- aov(formula_isa, data = leafSEM_normal)
        u_isa <- summary(fit_isa)[[1]]

        formula_isa <- as.formula(paste(v, "~ urb_cat_isa * dfe"))
        fit_isa <- aov(formula_isa, data = leafSEM_normal)
        int_isa <- summary(fit_isa)[[1]]
        
          # Extract p-values for first three terms
          p_dfe_isa     <- e_isa$`Pr(>F)`[1]
          p_urb_cat_isa <- u_isa$`Pr(>F)`[1]
          p_int_isa     <- int_isa$`Pr(>F)`[3]
        
        # DIST ANOVA
      
        formula_dist <- as.formula(paste(v, "~ urb_cat_dist"))
        fit_dist <- aov(formula_dist, data = leafSEM_normal)
        u_dist <- summary(fit_dist)[[1]]

        formula_dist <- as.formula(paste(v, "~ urb_cat_dist * dfe"))
        fit_dist <- aov(formula_dist, data = leafSEM_normal)
        int_dist <- summary(fit_dist)[[1]]
        
          # Extract p-values for first terms
          p_urb_cat_dist <- u_dist$`Pr(>F)`[1]
          p_int_dist     <- int_dist$`Pr(>F)`[3]
      
      # Pairwise comparisons
      
        # Distance
        pairwise_dist <- TukeyHSD(fit_dist, conf.level=.95)
        pairwise_dist <- as.data.frame(pairwise_dist$`urb_cat_dist:dfe`)
        names(pairwise_dist) <- gsub(" ", ".", names(pairwise_dist))
        HSD <- data.frame(Comparison = row.names(pairwise_dist), diff = pairwise_dist$diff, lwr = pairwise_dist$lwr, upr = pairwise_dist$upr,p.adj = pairwise_dist$p.adj
)
        HSD$Comparison <- c("UrbanEdge-RuralEdge","RuralInterior-RuralEdge","UrbanInterior-RuralEdge",
                              "RuralInterior-UrbanEdge","UrbanInterior-UrbanEdge","UrbanInterior-RuralInterior")
        cld_dist <- cldList(p.adj ~ Comparison, data = HSD,
                  threshold = 0.05,
                  remove.space=TRUE)
        
          # extracting p-values
            p_UrbanEdge_RuralEdge_dist <- HSD$p.adj[1]
            p_RuralInterior_RuralEdge_dist <- HSD$p.adj[2]
            p_UrbanInterior_RuralEdge_dist <- HSD$p.adj[3]
            p_RuralInterior_UrbanEdge_dist <- HSD$p.adj[4]
            p_UrbanInterior_UrbanEdge_dist <- HSD$p.adj[5]
            p_UrbanInterior_RuralInterior_dist <- HSD$p.adj[6]
        
          # extracting letters
            
            let_UrbanEdge_dist <- cld_dist$Letter[1]
            let_RuralInterior_dist <- cld_dist$Letter[2]
            let_UrbanInterior_dist <- cld_dist$Letter[3]
            let_RuralEdge_dist <- cld_dist$Letter[4]
    
        # ISA
        pairwise_isa <- TukeyHSD(fit_isa, conf.level=.95)
        pairwise_isa <- as.data.frame(pairwise_isa$`urb_cat_isa:dfe`)
        names(pairwise_isa) <- gsub(" ", ".", names(pairwise_isa))
        HSD <- data.frame(Comparison = row.names(pairwise_isa), diff = pairwise_isa$diff, lwr = pairwise_isa$lwr, upr = pairwise_isa$upr,p.adj = pairwise_isa$p.adj
)
        HSD$Comparison <- c("UrbanEdge-RuralEdge","RuralInterior-RuralEdge","UrbanInterior-RuralEdge",
                              "RuralInterior-UrbanEdge","UrbanInterior-UrbanEdge","UrbanInterior-RuralInterior")
        cld_isa <- cldList(p.adj ~ Comparison, data = HSD,
                  threshold = 0.05,
                  remove.space=TRUE)
        
          # extracting p-values
            p_UrbanEdge_RuralEdge_isa <- HSD$p.adj[1]
            p_RuralInterior_RuralEdge_isa <- HSD$p.adj[2]
            p_UrbanInterior_RuralEdge_isa <- HSD$p.adj[3]
            p_RuralInterior_UrbanEdge_isa <- HSD$p.adj[4]
            p_UrbanInterior_UrbanEdge_isa <- HSD$p.adj[5]
            p_UrbanInterior_RuralInterior_isa <- HSD$p.adj[6]
        
          # extracting letters
            
            let_UrbanEdge_isa <- cld_isa$Letter[1]
            let_RuralInterior_isa <- cld_isa$Letter[2]
            let_UrbanInterior_isa <- cld_isa$Letter[3]
            let_RuralEdge_isa <- cld_isa$Letter[4]            
            
            
      # Append to results
      ANOVA <- rbind(ANOVA, data.frame(
        variable = v,
        dfe = p_dfe_isa,
        urb_cat_isa = p_urb_cat_isa,
        int_isa = p_int_isa,
        urb_cat_dist = p_urb_cat_dist,
        int_dist = p_int_dist,
        UrbanEdge_RuralEdge_dist = p_UrbanEdge_RuralEdge_dist,
        RuralInterior_RuralEdge_dist = p_RuralInterior_RuralEdge_dist,
        UrbanInterior_RuralEdge_dist = p_UrbanInterior_RuralEdge_dist,
        RuralInterior_UrbanEdge_dist = p_RuralInterior_UrbanEdge_dist,
        UrbanInterior_UrbanEdge_dist = p_UrbanInterior_UrbanEdge_dist,
        UrbanInterior_RuralInterior_dist = p_UrbanInterior_RuralInterior_dist,
        UrbanEdge_dist = let_UrbanEdge_dist,
        RuralInterior_dist = let_RuralInterior_dist,
        UrbanInterior_dist = let_UrbanInterior_dist,
        RuralEdge_dist = let_RuralEdge_dist,
        UrbanEdge_RuralEdge_isa = p_UrbanEdge_RuralEdge_isa,
        RuralInterior_RuralEdge_isa = p_RuralInterior_RuralEdge_isa,
        UrbanInterior_RuralEdge_isa = p_UrbanInterior_RuralEdge_isa,
        RuralInterior_UrbanEdge_isa = p_RuralInterior_UrbanEdge_isa,
        UrbanInterior_UrbanEdge_isa = p_UrbanInterior_UrbanEdge_isa,
        UrbanInterior_RuralInterior_isa = p_UrbanInterior_RuralInterior_isa,
        UrbanEdge_isa = let_UrbanEdge_isa,
        RuralInterior_isa = let_RuralInterior_isa,
        UrbanInterior_isa = let_UrbanInterior_isa,
        RuralEdge_isa = let_RuralEdge_isa
      ))
    }

    # rounding the p-values to two decimal places
    ANOVA <- lapply(ANOVA, function(x) if (is.numeric(x)) signif(x, digits = 2) else x)
    ANOVA <- as.data.frame(ANOVA)

```  
    
### Parametric ANOVA with Nesting

### Loop for Figures (Means)
```{r}
    
for (i in 1:13) {
  
    # defining variables
    leaf_var_unt <- leaf_vars_unt[i]
    leaf_var_norm <- leaf_vars_norm[i]
    varlabel <- leafSEMnames[[leaf_var_unt]]
    
    
  # Figures
    
   # Distance to Boston 

    sum_dist <- data_summary(data = LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites,
                            varname = leaf_var_unt,
                            groupnames = c("urb_cat_dist", "dfe"))
    
    fig_dist <-
      ggplot(data=sum_dist,mapping=aes(x=urb_cat_dist,y=!!sym(leaf_var_unt),col=dfe)) +
      scale_color_manual(values = c("grey","black")) +
      geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), size = 3) +
      geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = !!sym(leaf_var_unt) - se, ymax = !!sym(leaf_var_unt) + se), 
                    width = 0.2, 
                    position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
      labs(title = "",
           x = "Site Type by Distance to Boston", 
           y = varlabel) +
      ylim(0,(1.45*(max(sum_dist[,3])+max(sum_dist$se)))) +
      theme_minimal() +   
      theme(legend.position="none") +
      guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Distance\nFrom Edge (m)")) +
      theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
            panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
            axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),
            aspect.ratio = 1,
            axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
            axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
            axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
            axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 15))
    
    # %ISA 
    
    sum_isa <- data_summary(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites,
                                 varname = leaf_var_unt,
                                groupnames = c("urb_cat_isa", "dfe"))
    
    fig_isa <-
      ggplot(data=sum_isa,mapping=aes(x=urb_cat_isa,y=!!sym(leaf_var_unt),col=dfe)) +
      scale_color_manual(values = c("grey","black")) +
      geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), size = 3) +
      geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = !!sym(leaf_var_unt) - se, ymax = !!sym(leaf_var_unt) + se), 
                    width = 0.2, 
                    position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
      labs(title = "",
           x = "Site Type by % Impervious Surface Area", 
           y = varlabel) +
      theme_minimal() +
      ylim(0,(1.45*(max(sum_isa[,3])+max(sum_isa$se)))) +
      theme(legend.position="none") +
      guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Distance\nFrom Edge (m)")) +
      theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
            panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
            axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),
            aspect.ratio = 1,
            axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
            axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
            axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
            axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 15))
  
    
# adding a figure annotation with the anova summary statistics

    if (all(is.na(leafSEM_normal[[leaf_var_norm]]) ) == "FALSE") {
      
    # p values
      
      EvI_dist_p <- ANOVA$dfe[i]
      UvR_dist_p <- ANOVA$urb_cat_dist[i]
      inx_dist_p <- ANOVA$int_dist[i]
        
      EvI_isa_p <- ANOVA$dfe[i]
      UvR_isa_p <- ANOVA$urb_cat_isa[i]
      inx_isa_p <- ANOVA$int_isa[i]
      
    # labels 
      
      EvI_dist_p_lab <- if (EvI_dist_p <= 0.001) "p < 0.001" else EvI_dist_p
      UvR_dist_p_lab <- if (UvR_dist_p <= 0.001) "p < 0.001" else UvR_dist_p
      inx_dist_p_lab <- if (inx_dist_p <= 0.001) "p < 0.001" else inx_dist_p
      
      EvI_isa_p_lab <- if (EvI_isa_p <= 0.001) "p < 0.001" else EvI_isa_p
      UvR_isa_p_lab <- if (UvR_isa_p <= 0.001) "p < 0.001" else UvR_isa_p
      inx_isa_p_lab <- if (inx_isa_p <= 0.001) "p < 0.001" else inx_isa_p
      
      label_text_dist <- paste0(
        
        "Edge vs. Interior: p = ", EvI_dist_p_lab, "\n",
        "Urban vs. Rural: p = ", UvR_dist_p_lab, "\n",
        "Interaction: p = ", inx_dist_p_lab, "\n"
      )
      
      label_text_isa <- paste0(
        
        "Edge vs. Interior: p = ", EvI_isa_p_lab, "\n",
        "Urban vs. Rural: p = ", UvR_isa_p_lab, "\n",
        "Interaction: p = ", inx_isa_p_lab, "\n"
      )
      
     # calculating label position
        y_max_dist <- max(sum_dist[,3])+max(sum_dist$se)
        text_pos_y_dist <- y_max_dist + 0.25 * (y_max_dist)
        
        y_max_isa <- max(sum_isa[,3])+max(sum_isa$se)
        text_pos_y_isa <- y_max_isa + 0.25 * (y_max_isa)
        
     # letters
        
      # add in the significance letter associated with each group
          sum_dist$letter <- NA
          sum_dist$letter[1] <- ANOVA$RuralEdge_dist[i]
          sum_dist$letter[2] <- ANOVA$RuralInterior_dist[i]
          sum_dist$letter[3] <- ANOVA$UrbanEdge_dist[i]
          sum_dist$letter[4] <- ANOVA$UrbanInterior_dist[i]
          
          sum_isa$letter <- NA
          sum_isa$letter[1] <- ANOVA$RuralEdge_isa[i]
          sum_isa$letter[2] <- ANOVA$RuralInterior_isa[i]
          sum_isa$letter[3] <- ANOVA$UrbanEdge_isa[i]
          sum_isa$letter[4] <- ANOVA$UrbanInterior_isa[i]
          
      # add in maximum for y axis in each group (for positioning letter)
          sum_dist$max <- NA
          sum_dist$max[1] <- sum_dist[1,3]+sum_dist$se[1]+(max(sum_dist[1,3]))*0.01
          sum_dist$max[2] <- sum_dist[2,3]+sum_dist$se[2]+(max(sum_dist[2,3]))*0.01
          sum_dist$max[3] <- sum_dist[3,3]+sum_dist$se[3]+(max(sum_dist[3,3]))*0.01
          sum_dist$max[4] <- sum_dist[4,3]+sum_dist$se[4]+(max(sum_dist[4,3]))*0.01
          
          sum_isa$max <- NA
          sum_isa$max[1] <- sum_isa[1,3]+sum_isa$se[1]+(max(sum_isa[1,3]))*0.01
          sum_isa$max[2] <- sum_isa[2,3]+sum_isa$se[2]+(max(sum_isa[2,3]))*0.01
          sum_isa$max[3] <- sum_isa[3,3]+sum_isa$se[3]+(max(sum_isa[3,3]))*0.01
          sum_isa$max[4] <- sum_isa[4,3]+sum_isa$se[4]+(max(sum_isa[4,3]))*0.01
        
     # figure annotation
      fig_dist <- fig_dist +
          annotate(
            geom = "text",
            y = Inf,
            x = 0.5,
            hjust=0,
            vjust=1,
            label = label_text_dist,
            size = 3
          ) +
        geom_text(data = sum_dist,
                  aes(label = letter, y = max), 
                  position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), hjust=0.5, vjust=0, size = 5, fontface = "bold")
      
      
      fig_isa <- fig_isa +
          annotate(
            geom = "text",
            y = Inf,
            x = 0.5,
            hjust=0,
            vjust=1,
            label = label_text_isa,
            size = 3
          ) +
        geom_text(data = sum_isa,
                  aes(label = letter, y = max), 
                  position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), hjust=0.5, vjust=0, size = 5, fontface = "bold")
    }
    
    if (all(is.na(leafSEM_normal[[leaf_var_norm]]) ) == "TRUE") {
      
      null_label <- paste0("data not normal after any transformation,\nno parametric statistics calculated")
      
        y_max_dist <- max(sum_dist[,3])+max(sum_dist$se)
        text_pos_y_dist <- y_max_dist + 0.25 * (y_max_dist)
        
        y_max_isa <- max(sum_isa[,3])+max(sum_isa$se)
        text_pos_y_isa <- y_max_isa + 0.25 * (y_max_isa)
      
    # figure annotation
      fig_dist <- fig_dist +
          annotate(
            geom = "text",
            y = Inf,
            x = 0.5,
            hjust=0,
            vjust=1,
            label = null_label,
            size = 4
          ) 
      
      fig_isa <- fig_isa +
          annotate(
            geom = "text",
            y = Inf,
            x = 0.5,
            hjust=0,
            vjust=1,
            label = null_label,
            size = 4
          ) 
      
    }
    
    
  # Printing
      figs <- plot_grid(fig_dist,fig_isa,legend,labels=NULL,ncol=3,rel_widths=c(1,1,0.3))
      
      LeafSEM_ANOVA[[leaf_var_unt]] <- figs
      LeafSEM_ANOVA_ISA[[leaf_var_unt]] <- fig_isa
      
      # printing figure
      setwd("/Users/emmadaily/BOSTON UNIVERSITY Dropbox/Emma Daily/Lab Files/Projects/UNE/Particulate Matter Project/Daily PM Analysis/RCode/LeafSEM/Figures/Categorical/Parametric ANOVA")
      
      ggsave(paste(leaf_var_unt,"_cat.png"), plot = figs, width = 9,
        height = 4, bg = "white")
}    
```
### Loop for Figures (Medians)
```{r}

LeafSEM_ANOVA_ISA_jit <- list()
    
for (i in 1:13) {
  
    # defining variables
    leaf_var_unt <- leaf_vars_unt[i]
    leaf_var_norm <- leaf_vars_norm[i]
    varlabel <- leafSEMnames[[leaf_var_unt]]

    dodge <- position_dodge(width = 0.3)
    
  # Figures
    
   # Distance to Boston 

    sum_dist <- data_summary(data = LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites,
                            varname = leaf_var_unt,
                            groupnames = c("urb_cat_dist", "dfe"))
    
    sum_dist <- cbind(aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites[[leaf_var_unt]],list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$urb_cat_dist,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=ci95_median_boot))
    sum_dist <- as.matrix(sum_dist)
    colnames(sum_dist) <- c("urb_cat_dist","dfe","var","lower","upper")
    sum_dist <- as.data.frame(sum_dist)
    sum_dist$var <- as.numeric(sum_dist$var)
    sum_dist$lower     <- as.numeric(sum_dist$lower)
    sum_dist$upper     <- as.numeric(sum_dist$upper)
    
    fig_dist <-
      ggplot(data=sum_dist,mapping=aes(x=urb_cat_dist,y=var,col=dfe)) +
      scale_color_manual(values = c("grey","black")) +
      geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), size = 3) +
      geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
                      width = 0.2,
                      position = dodge,
                      linewidth = 1.2) +
      labs(title = "",
           x = "Site Type by Distance to Boston", 
           y = varlabel) +
      theme_minimal() +   
      theme(legend.position="none") +
      ylim(0,(max(sum_dist[,5]*1.45))) +
      guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Distance\nFrom Edge (m)")) +
      theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
            panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
            axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),
            aspect.ratio = 1,
            axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
            axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
            axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
            axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 15))+
      # Raw data points
        geom_point(
          data = LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites,
          aes(x = urb_cat_dist,
              y = .data[[leaf_var_unt]],
              col = dfe),
          position = position_jitterdodge(
            jitter.width = 0.15,
            dodge.width = 0.3
          ),
          alpha = 0.4,
          size = 1.5,
          inherit.aes = FALSE
        ) 
    
    sum_isa <- data_summary(data = LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites,
                            varname = leaf_var_unt,
                            groupnames = c("urb_cat_isa", "dfe"))
    
    sum_isa <- cbind(aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites[[leaf_var_unt]],list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$urb_cat_isa,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=ci95_median_boot))
    sum_isa <- as.matrix(sum_isa)
    colnames(sum_isa) <- c("urb_cat_isa","dfe","var","lower","upper")
    sum_isa <- as.data.frame(sum_isa)
    sum_isa$var <- as.numeric(sum_isa$var)
    sum_isa$lower     <- as.numeric(sum_isa$lower)
    sum_isa$upper     <- as.numeric(sum_isa$upper)
    
    fig_isa <-
      ggplot(data=sum_isa,mapping=aes(x=urb_cat_isa,y=var,col=dfe)) +
      scale_color_manual(values = c("grey","black")) +
      geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), size = 3) +
      geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
                      width = 0.2,
                      position = dodge,
                      linewidth = 1.2) +
      labs(title = "",
           x = "Site Type by %ISA", 
           y = varlabel) +
      theme_minimal() +   
      theme(legend.position="none") +
      ylim(0,(max(sum_isa[,5]*1.45))) +
      guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Distance\nFrom Edge (m)")) +
      theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
            panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
            axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),
            aspect.ratio = 1,
            axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
            axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
            axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
            axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 15)) +
      # Raw data points
        geom_point(
          data = LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites,
          aes(x = urb_cat_isa,
              y = .data[[leaf_var_unt]],
              col = dfe),
          position = position_jitterdodge(
            jitter.width = 0.15,
            dodge.width = 0.3
          ),
          alpha = 0.4,
          size = 1.5,
          inherit.aes = FALSE
        )
  
    
# adding a figure annotation with the anova summary statistics

    if (all(is.na(leafSEM_normal[[leaf_var_norm]]) ) == "FALSE") {
      
    # p values
      
      EvI_dist_p <- ANOVA$dfe[i]
      UvR_dist_p <- ANOVA$urb_cat_dist[i]
      inx_dist_p <- ANOVA$int_dist[i]
        
      EvI_isa_p <- ANOVA$dfe[i]
      UvR_isa_p <- ANOVA$urb_cat_isa[i]
      inx_isa_p <- ANOVA$int_isa[i]
      
    # labels 
      
      EvI_dist_p_lab <- if (EvI_dist_p <= 0.001) "p < 0.001" else EvI_dist_p
      UvR_dist_p_lab <- if (UvR_dist_p <= 0.001) "p < 0.001" else UvR_dist_p
      inx_dist_p_lab <- if (inx_dist_p <= 0.001) "p < 0.001" else inx_dist_p
      
      EvI_isa_p_lab <- if (EvI_isa_p <= 0.001) "p < 0.001" else EvI_isa_p
      UvR_isa_p_lab <- if (UvR_isa_p <= 0.001) "p < 0.001" else UvR_isa_p
      inx_isa_p_lab <- if (inx_isa_p <= 0.001) "p < 0.001" else inx_isa_p
      
      label_text_dist <- paste0(
        
        "Edge vs. Interior: p = ", EvI_dist_p_lab, "\n",
        "Urban vs. Rural: p = ", UvR_dist_p_lab, "\n",
        "Interaction: p = ", inx_dist_p_lab, "\n"
      )
      
      label_text_isa <- paste0(
        
        "Edge vs. Interior: p = ", EvI_isa_p_lab, "\n",
        "Urban vs. Rural: p = ", UvR_isa_p_lab, "\n",
        "Interaction: p = ", inx_isa_p_lab, "\n"
      )
      
     # calculating label position
        y_max_dist <- max(sum_dist[,5])
        text_pos_y_dist <- y_max_dist + 0.25 * (y_max_dist)
        
        y_max_isa <- max(sum_isa[,5])
        text_pos_y_isa <- y_max_isa + 0.25 * (y_max_isa)
        
     # letters
        
      # add in the significance letter associated with each group
          sum_dist$letter <- NA
          sum_dist$letter[1] <- ANOVA$RuralEdge_dist[i]
          sum_dist$letter[3] <- ANOVA$RuralInterior_dist[i]
          sum_dist$letter[2] <- ANOVA$UrbanEdge_dist[i]
          sum_dist$letter[4] <- ANOVA$UrbanInterior_dist[i]
          
          sum_isa$letter <- NA
          sum_isa$letter[1] <- ANOVA$RuralEdge_isa[i]
          sum_isa$letter[3] <- ANOVA$RuralInterior_isa[i]
          sum_isa$letter[2] <- ANOVA$UrbanEdge_isa[i]
          sum_isa$letter[4] <- ANOVA$UrbanInterior_isa[i]
        
     # figure annotation
      fig_dist <- fig_dist +
          annotate(
            geom = "text",
            y = Inf,
            x = 0.5,
            vjust=1,
            hjust=0,
            label = label_text_dist,
            size = 3
          ) +
        geom_text(data = sum_dist,
                  aes(label = letter, y = upper), 
                  position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), hjust=0.5, vjust=0, size = 5, fontface = "bold")
      
      
      fig_isa <- fig_isa +
          annotate(
            geom = "text",
            y = Inf,
            x = 0.5,
            hjust=0,
            vjust=1,
            label = label_text_isa,
            size = 3
          ) +
        geom_text(data = sum_isa,
                  aes(label = letter, y = upper), 
                  position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), hjust=0.5, vjust=0, size = 5, fontface = "bold")
    }
    
    if (all(is.na(leafSEM_normal[[leaf_var_norm]]) ) == "TRUE") {
      
      null_label <- paste0("data not normal after any transformation,\nno parametric statistics calculated")
      
        y_max_dist <- max(sum_dist[,5])
        text_pos_y_dist <- y_max_dist + 0.25 * (y_max_dist)
        
        y_max_isa <- max(sum_isa[,5])
        text_pos_y_isa <- y_max_isa + 0.25 * (y_max_isa)
      
    # figure annotation
      fig_dist <- fig_dist +
          annotate(
            geom = "text",
            y = Inf,
            x = 0.5,
            hjust=0,
            vjust=1,
            label = null_label,
            size = 4
          ) 
      
      fig_isa <- fig_isa +
          annotate(
            geom = "text",
            y = Inf,
            x = 0.5,
            hjust=0,
            vjust=1,
            label = null_label,
            size = 4
          ) 
      
    }
    
    
  # Printing
      figs <- plot_grid(fig_dist,fig_isa,legend,labels=NULL,ncol=3,rel_widths=c(1,1,0.3))
      
      LeafSEM_ANOVA[[leaf_var_unt]] <- figs
      LeafSEM_ANOVA_ISA_jit[[leaf_var_unt]] <- fig_isa
      
      # printing figure
      setwd("/Users/emmadaily/BOSTON UNIVERSITY Dropbox/Emma Daily/Lab Files/Projects/UNE/Particulate Matter Project/Daily PM Analysis/RCode/LeafSEM/Figures/Categorical/Parametric ANOVA")
      
      ggsave(paste(leaf_var_unt,"_cat_jit.png"), plot = figs, width = 9,
        height = 4, bg = "white")
}    
```

## Non-Parametric Analyses 
### Aligned-Ranks Transformation ANOVA loop
```{r}

    # defining lists of variable names
    leaf_vars_unt <- names(leafSEM_unt) 
    leaf_vars_norm <- names(leafSEM_normal)

# Prepare output dataframe
    ART_ANOVA <- data.frame(
      variable = character(),
      dfe = numeric(),
      urb_cat_isa = numeric(),
      int_isa = numeric(),
      urb_cat_dist = numeric(),
      int_dist = numeric(),
      "UrbanEdge_RuralEdge_dist" = numeric(),
      "RuralInterior_RuralEdge_dist" = numeric(),
      "UrbanInterior_RuralEdge_dist" = numeric(),
      "RuralInterior_UrbanEdge_dist" = numeric(),
      "UrbanInterior_UrbanEdge_dist" = numeric(),
      "UrbanInterior_RuralInterior_dist" = numeric(),
      "UrbanEdge_dist" = character(),
      "RuralInterior_dist"= character(),
      "UrbanInterior_dist"= character(),
      "RuralEdge_dist"= character(),
      "UrbanEdge_RuralEdge_isa" = numeric(),
      "RuralInterior_RuralEdge_isa" = numeric(),
      "UrbanInterior_RuralEdge_isa" = numeric(),
      "RuralInterior_UrbanEdge_isa" = numeric(),
      "UrbanInterior_UrbanEdge_isa" = numeric(),
      "UrbanInterior_RuralInterior_isa" = numeric(),
      "UrbanEdge_isa" = character(),
      "RuralInterior_isa"= character(),
      "UrbanInterior_isa"= character(),
      "RuralEdge_isa"= character(),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )

    LeafSEM_ART_ANOVA <- list()
    
    for (v in leaf_vars_unt[1:13]) {
    
      # Get the variable column
      y <- leafSEM_unt[[v]]

# ART_ANOVAS
      
        # ISA ART_ANOVA
        
        formula_isa <- as.formula(paste(v, "~ urb_cat_isa * dfe"))
        X_ART_isa <- art(formula_isa,data=leafSEM_unt)
        X_aovART_isa <- anova(X_ART_isa)
    
          # Extract p-values for first three terms
          p_urb_cat_isa <- X_aovART_isa["urb_cat_isa","Pr(>F)"]
          p_dfe_isa     <- X_aovART_isa["dfe","Pr(>F)"]
          p_int_isa     <- X_aovART_isa["urb_cat_isa:dfe","Pr(>F)"]
        
        # DIST ART_ANOVA
        
        formula_dist <- as.formula(paste(v, "~ urb_cat_dist * dfe"))
        X_ART_dist <- art(formula_dist,data=leafSEM_unt)
        X_aovART_dist <- anova(X_ART_dist)
    
          # Extract p-values for first three terms
          p_urb_cat_dist <- X_aovART_dist["urb_cat_dist","Pr(>F)"]
          p_dfe_dist     <- X_aovART_dist["dfe","Pr(>F)"]
          p_int_dist     <- X_aovART_dist["urb_cat_dist:dfe","Pr(>F)"]
      
      # Pairwise comparisons
      
        # Distance
            art.con_X_ART_dist <- art.con(X_ART_dist,~urb_cat_dist*dfe, adjust="none")
            art.con_X_ART_dist <- as.data.frame(art.con_X_ART_dist)
            letters_dist <- cldList(
            p.value ~ contrast,
            data = art.con_X_ART_dist,
            threshold = 0.05  
          )
        
          # extracting p-values
            p_RuralInterior_RuralEdge_dist <- art.con_X_ART_dist$p.value[1]
            p_UrbanEdge_RuralEdge_dist <- art.con_X_ART_dist$p.value[2]
            p_UrbanInterior_RuralEdge_dist <- art.con_X_ART_dist$p.value[3]
            p_RuralInterior_UrbanEdge_dist <- art.con_X_ART_dist$p.value[4]
            p_UrbanInterior_RuralInterior_dist <- art.con_X_ART_dist$p.value[5]
            p_UrbanInterior_UrbanEdge_dist  <- art.con_X_ART_dist$p.value[6]
            
          # extracting letters
            
            let_RuralEdge_dist <- letters_dist$Letter[1]
            let_RuralInterior_dist <- letters_dist$Letter[2]
            let_UrbanEdge_dist <- letters_dist$Letter[3]
            let_UrbanInterior_dist <- letters_dist$Letter[4]
    
        # Distance
            art.con_X_ART_isa <- art.con(X_ART_isa,~urb_cat_isa*dfe, adjust="none")
            art.con_X_ART_isa <- as.data.frame(art.con_X_ART_isa)
            letters_isa <- cldList(
            p.value ~ contrast,
            data = art.con_X_ART_isa,
            threshold = 0.05  
          )
        
          # extracting p-values
            p_RuralInterior_RuralEdge_isa <- art.con_X_ART_isa$p.value[1]
            p_UrbanEdge_RuralEdge_isa <- art.con_X_ART_isa$p.value[2]
            p_UrbanInterior_RuralEdge_isa <- art.con_X_ART_isa$p.value[3]
            p_RuralInterior_UrbanEdge_isa <- art.con_X_ART_isa$p.value[4]
            p_UrbanInterior_RuralInterior_isa <- art.con_X_ART_isa$p.value[5]
            p_UrbanInterior_UrbanEdge_isa  <- art.con_X_ART_isa$p.value[6]
            
          # extracting letters
            
            let_RuralEdge_isa <- letters_isa$Letter[1]
            let_RuralInterior_isa <- letters_isa$Letter[2]
            let_UrbanEdge_isa <- letters_isa$Letter[3]
            let_UrbanInterior_isa <- letters_isa$Letter[4]         
            
            
      # Append to results
      ART_ANOVA <- rbind(ART_ANOVA, data.frame(
        variable = v,
        dfe = p_dfe_isa,
        urb_cat_isa = p_urb_cat_isa,
        int_isa = p_int_isa,
        urb_cat_dist = p_urb_cat_dist,
        int_dist = p_int_dist,
        UrbanEdge_RuralEdge_dist = p_UrbanEdge_RuralEdge_dist,
        RuralInterior_RuralEdge_dist = p_RuralInterior_RuralEdge_dist,
        UrbanInterior_RuralEdge_dist = p_UrbanInterior_RuralEdge_dist,
        RuralInterior_UrbanEdge_dist = p_RuralInterior_UrbanEdge_dist,
        UrbanInterior_UrbanEdge_dist = p_UrbanInterior_UrbanEdge_dist,
        UrbanInterior_RuralInterior_dist = p_UrbanInterior_RuralInterior_dist,
        UrbanEdge_dist = let_UrbanEdge_dist,
        RuralInterior_dist = let_RuralInterior_dist,
        UrbanInterior_dist = let_UrbanInterior_dist,
        RuralEdge_dist = let_RuralEdge_dist,
        UrbanEdge_RuralEdge_isa = p_UrbanEdge_RuralEdge_isa,
        RuralInterior_RuralEdge_isa = p_RuralInterior_RuralEdge_isa,
        UrbanInterior_RuralEdge_isa = p_UrbanInterior_RuralEdge_isa,
        RuralInterior_UrbanEdge_isa = p_RuralInterior_UrbanEdge_isa,
        UrbanInterior_UrbanEdge_isa = p_UrbanInterior_UrbanEdge_isa,
        UrbanInterior_RuralInterior_isa = p_UrbanInterior_RuralInterior_isa,
        UrbanEdge_isa = let_UrbanEdge_isa,
        RuralInterior_isa = let_RuralInterior_isa,
        UrbanInterior_isa = let_UrbanInterior_isa,
        RuralEdge_isa = let_RuralEdge_isa
      ))
      
# testing between urban & rural
      formula <- as.formula(paste(v,"~urb_cat_isa"))
          X_kw <- kruskal.test(formula, data = leafSEM_unt)
      
# Kruskal-Wallis Tests
      
    # Kruskal-Wallis test with each group
    
    # creating a column with the groups "Rural0", "Rural90", "Urban0", "Urban90", "RuralOpen", and "UrbanOpen"
     leafSEM_unt$groupISA <- paste(leafSEM_unt$urb_cat_isa,leafSEM_unt$dfe)
     leafSEM_unt$groupDist <- paste(leafSEM_unt$urb_cat_dist,leafSEM_unt$dfe)
     
    # Kruskal-Wallis Test
          formula <- as.formula(paste(v,"~groupISA"))
          X_kw <- kruskal.test(formula, data = leafSEM_unt)
        
            # Dunn post-hoc pairwise
            dunn_res <- dunn_test(
                  data = leafSEM_unt,
                  formula,
                  p.adjust.method = "BH"
                )
           
            # Create named vector of adjusted p-values
            pvals <- dunn_res$p.adj
            names(pvals) <- paste(dunn_res$group1, dunn_res$group2, sep = "-")
            
            # Generate letters
            letters_kw_isa <- multcompLetters(pvals)$Letters
            letters_kw_isa <- as.data.frame(letters_kw_isa)
          
          formula <- as.formula(paste(v,"~groupDist"))
          X_kw <- kruskal.test(formula, data = leafSEM_unt)
        
            # Dunn post-hoc pairwise
            dunn_res <- dunn_test(
                  data = leafSEM_unt,
                  formula,
                  p.adjust.method = "BH"
                )
           
            # Create named vector of adjusted p-values
            pvals <- dunn_res$p.adj
            names(pvals) <- paste(dunn_res$group1, dunn_res$group2, sep = "-")
            
            # Generate letters
            letters_kw_dist <- multcompLetters(pvals)$Letters
            letters_kw_dist <- as.data.frame(letters_kw_dist)

    }

    # rounding the p-values to two decimal places
    ART_ANOVA <- lapply(ART_ANOVA, function(x) if (is.numeric(x)) signif(x, digits = 2) else x)
    ART_ANOVA <- as.data.frame(ART_ANOVA)
```

### Loop for Figures (Means & Medians)
```{r}

    # defining lists of variable names
    leaf_vars_unt <- names(leafSEM_unt) 
    leaf_vars_norm <- names(leafSEM_normal)
    
    # defining lists to subset figures for publication
    figs_pub <- list()
    figs_pub_medians <- list()
    
for (i in 1:13) {
  
    # defining variables
    leaf_var_unt <- leaf_vars_unt[i]
    leaf_var_norm <- leaf_vars_norm[i]
    varlabel <- leafSEMnames[[leaf_var_unt]]
    vartitle <- leafSEMtitles[[leaf_var_unt]]
    
    
  # Figures
    
    # Means
    
       # Distance to Boston 
        
        sum_dist <- data_summary(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites,
                                varname = leaf_var_unt,
                                groupnames = c("urb_cat_dist", "dfe"))
        
        fig_dist <-
          ggplot(data=sum_dist,mapping=aes(x=urb_cat_dist,y=!!sym(leaf_var_unt),col=dfe)) +
          scale_color_manual(values = c("grey","black")) +
          geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), size = 3) +
          geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = !!sym(leaf_var_unt) - se, ymax = !!sym(leaf_var_unt) + se), 
                        width = 0.2, 
                        position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
          labs(title = "",
               x = "Site Type by Distance to Boston", 
               y = varlabel) +
          ylim(0,(1.45*(max(sum_dist[,3])+max(sum_dist$se)))) +
          theme_minimal() +   
          theme(legend.position="none") +
          guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Distance\nFrom Edge (m)")) +
          theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
                panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
                axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),
                aspect.ratio = 1,
                axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
                axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
                axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
                axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 15))
        
        # %ISA 
        
        sum_isa <- data_summary(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites,
                                     varname = leaf_var_unt,
                                    groupnames = c("urb_cat_isa", "dfe"))
        
        fig_isa <-
          ggplot(data=sum_isa,mapping=aes(x=urb_cat_isa,y=!!sym(leaf_var_unt),col=dfe)) +
          scale_color_manual(values = c("grey","black")) +
          geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), size = 3) +
          geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = !!sym(leaf_var_unt) - se, ymax = !!sym(leaf_var_unt) + se), 
                        width = 0.2, 
                        position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
          labs(title = "",
               x = "Site Type by % Impervious Surface Area", 
               y = varlabel) +
          theme_minimal() +
          ylim(0,(1.45*(max(sum_isa[,3])+max(sum_isa$se)))) +
          theme(legend.position="none") +
          guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Distance\nFrom Edge (m)")) +
          theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
                panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
                axis.line = element_line(color = "black"),
                aspect.ratio = 1,
                axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
                axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
                axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
                axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 15))
        
        fig_pub <-
          ggplot(data=sum_isa,mapping=aes(x=urb_cat_isa,y=!!sym(leaf_var_unt),col=dfe)) +
          scale_color_manual(values = c("grey","black")) +
          geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), size = 3) +
          geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = !!sym(leaf_var_unt) - se, ymax = !!sym(leaf_var_unt) + se), 
                        width = 0.2, 
                        position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
          labs(title = vartitle,
               x = NULL, 
               y = varlabel) +
          theme_minimal() +
          ylim(0,(1.45*(max(sum_isa[,3])+max(sum_isa$se)))) +
          theme(legend.position="none") +
          guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Distance\nFrom Edge (m)")) +
          theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 18, hjust = 0.5),
              legend.position = "none",
              panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
              panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
              axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
              aspect.ratio = 1,
              axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
              axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
              axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 15),
              axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", size = 15)) 
      
        
    # adding a figure annotation with the anova summary statistics
          
        # p values
          
          EvI_dist_p <- ART_ANOVA$dfe[i]
          UvR_dist_p <- ART_ANOVA$urb_cat_dist[i]
          inx_dist_p <- ART_ANOVA$int_dist[i]
            
          EvI_isa_p <- ART_ANOVA$dfe[i]
          UvR_isa_p <- ART_ANOVA$urb_cat_isa[i]
          inx_isa_p <- ART_ANOVA$int_isa[i]
          
        # labels 
          
          EvI_dist_p_lab <- EvI_dist_p
          UvR_dist_p_lab <- UvR_dist_p
          inx_dist_p_lab <- inx_dist_p
          
          EvI_isa_p_lab <- EvI_isa_p
          UvR_isa_p_lab <- UvR_isa_p
          inx_isa_p_lab <- inx_isa_p
          
          label_text_dist <- paste0(
            
            "Edge vs. Interior: p = ", EvI_dist_p_lab, "\n",
            "Urban vs. Rural: p = ", UvR_dist_p_lab, "\n",
            "Interaction: p = ", inx_dist_p_lab, "\n"
          )
          
          label_text_isa <- paste0(
            
            "Edge vs. Interior: p = ", EvI_isa_p_lab, "\n",
            "Urban vs. Rural: p = ", UvR_isa_p_lab, "\n",
            "Interaction: p = ", inx_isa_p_lab, "\n"
          )
          
         # calculating label position
            y_max_dist <- max(sum_dist[,3])+max(sum_dist$se)
            text_pos_y_dist <- y_max_dist + 0.25 * (y_max_dist)
            
            y_max_isa <- max(sum_isa[,3])+max(sum_isa$se)
            text_pos_y_isa <- y_max_isa + 0.25 * (y_max_isa)
            
         # letters
            
          # add in the significance letter associated with each group
              sum_dist$letter <- NA
              sum_dist$letter[1] <- ART_ANOVA$UrbanEdge_dist[i]
              sum_dist$letter[2] <- ART_ANOVA$UrbanInterior_dist[i]
              sum_dist$letter[3] <- ART_ANOVA$RuralEdge_dist[i]
              sum_dist$letter[4] <- ART_ANOVA$RuralInterior_dist[i]
              
              sum_isa$letter <- NA
              sum_isa$letter[1] <- ART_ANOVA$UrbanEdge_isa[i]
              sum_isa$letter[2] <- ART_ANOVA$UrbanInterior_isa[i]
              sum_isa$letter[3] <- ART_ANOVA$RuralEdge_isa[i]
              sum_isa$letter[4] <- ART_ANOVA$RuralInterior_isa[i]
              
          # add in maximum for y axis in each group (for positioning letter)
              sum_dist$max <- NA
              sum_dist$max[1] <- sum_dist[1,3]+sum_dist$se[1]+(max(sum_dist[1,3]))*0.01
              sum_dist$max[2] <- sum_dist[2,3]+sum_dist$se[2]+(max(sum_dist[2,3]))*0.01
              sum_dist$max[3] <- sum_dist[3,3]+sum_dist$se[3]+(max(sum_dist[3,3]))*0.01
              sum_dist$max[4] <- sum_dist[4,3]+sum_dist$se[4]+(max(sum_dist[4,3]))*0.01
              
              sum_isa$max <- NA
              sum_isa$max[1] <- sum_isa[1,3]+sum_isa$se[1]+(max(sum_isa[1,3]))*0.01
              sum_isa$max[2] <- sum_isa[2,3]+sum_isa$se[2]+(max(sum_isa[2,3]))*0.01
              sum_isa$max[3] <- sum_isa[3,3]+sum_isa$se[3]+(max(sum_isa[3,3]))*0.01
              sum_isa$max[4] <- sum_isa[4,3]+sum_isa$se[4]+(max(sum_isa[4,3]))*0.01
            
         # figure annotation
          fig_dist <- fig_dist +
              annotate(
                geom = "text",
                y = text_pos_y_dist,
                x = 0.5,
                hjust=0,
                label = label_text_dist,
                size = 4
              ) +
            geom_text(data = sum_dist,
                      mapping = aes(y = max, label = letter),
                      position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), hjust=0.5, vjust=0, size = 5, fontface = "bold")
          
          
          fig_isa <- fig_isa +
              annotate(
                "text",
                y = text_pos_y_isa,
                x = 0.5,
                hjust=0,
                label = label_text_isa,
                size = 4
              ) +
            geom_text(data = sum_isa,
                      aes(label = letter, y = max), 
                      position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), hjust=0.5, vjust=0, size = 5, fontface = "bold")
          
          fig_pub <- fig_pub +
              annotate(
                "text",
                y = text_pos_y_isa,
                x = 0.5,
                hjust=0,
                label = label_text_isa,
                size = 4
              ) +
            geom_text(data = sum_isa,
                      aes(label = letter, y = max), 
                      position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), hjust=0.5, vjust=0, size = 5, fontface = "bold")
      
      # Printing
          figs <- plot_grid(fig_dist,fig_isa,legend,labels=NULL,ncol=3,rel_widths=c(1,1,0.3))
          
      # saving figures to list for publication
          figs_pub[[leaf_var_unt]] <- fig_pub 
          
          # printing figure
          setwd("/Users/emmadaily/BOSTON UNIVERSITY Dropbox/Emma Daily/Lab Files/Projects/UNE/Particulate Matter Project/Daily PM Analysis/RCode/LeafSEM/Figures/Categorical/ART ANOVA/Means")
          
          ggsave(paste(leaf_var_unt,"_cat_ART.png"), plot = figs, width = 9,
            height = 4, bg = "white")

              
    # Medians
    
            # summarize the element by urbanization and distance from edge
            median_summary_isa <- cbind(aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites[[leaf_var_unt]],list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$urb_cat_isa,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=ci95_median_boot))
            median_summary_isa <- as.matrix(median_summary_isa)
            colnames(median_summary_isa) <- c("urb_cat_isa","dfe","var","lower","upper")
            median_summary_isa <- as.data.frame(median_summary_isa)
            median_summary_isa$var <- as.numeric(median_summary_isa$var)
            median_summary_isa$lower     <- as.numeric(median_summary_isa$lower)
            median_summary_isa$upper     <- as.numeric(median_summary_isa$upper)
    
            median_summary_dist <- cbind(aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites[[leaf_var_unt]],list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$urb_cat_dist,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=ci95_median_boot))
            median_summary_dist <- as.matrix(median_summary_dist)
            colnames(median_summary_dist) <- c("urb_cat_dist","dfe","var","lower","upper")
            median_summary_dist <- as.data.frame(median_summary_dist)
            median_summary_dist$var <- as.numeric(median_summary_dist$var)
            median_summary_dist$lower     <- as.numeric(median_summary_dist$lower)
            median_summary_dist$upper     <- as.numeric(median_summary_dist$upper)            
    
            
        # add in the significance letters, making sure the right groups correspond!
            
            median_summary_dist$letter <- NA
            median_summary_dist$letter[1] <- ART_ANOVA$RuralEdge_dist[i]
            median_summary_dist$letter[3] <- ART_ANOVA$RuralInterior_dist[i]
            median_summary_dist$letter[2] <- ART_ANOVA$UrbanEdge_dist[i]
            median_summary_dist$letter[4] <- ART_ANOVA$UrbanInterior_dist[i]
              
            median_summary_isa$letter <- NA
            median_summary_isa$letter[1] <- ART_ANOVA$RuralEdge_isa[i]
            median_summary_isa$letter[3] <- ART_ANOVA$RuralInterior_isa[i]
            median_summary_isa$letter[2] <- ART_ANOVA$UrbanEdge_isa[i]
            median_summary_isa$letter[4] <- ART_ANOVA$UrbanInterior_isa[i]
            
            # median_summary_dist$letter[1] <- letters_kw_dist$letters_kw_dist[1] # using letters from K-W
            # median_summary_dist$letter[2] <- letters_kw_dist$letters_kw_dist[3]
            # median_summary_dist$letter[3] <- letters_kw_dist$letters_kw_dist[2]
            # median_summary_dist$letter[4] <- letters_kw_dist$letters_kw_dist[4]
            
            # median_summary_isa$letter[1] <- letters_kw_isa$letters_kw_isa[1] # using letters from K-W
            # median_summary_isa$letter[2] <- letters_kw_isa$letters_kw_isa[3]
            # median_summary_isa$letter[3] <- letters_kw_isa$letters_kw_isa[2]
            # median_summary_isa$letter[4] <- letters_kw_isa$letters_kw_isa[4]
          
        
        fig_isa <- 
          ggplot(median_summary_isa,mapping=aes(x=urb_cat_isa,y=var,col=dfe)) +
          geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), size = 3) +
          geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), 
                        width = 0.2, 
                        position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
          labs(title = " ",
               x = "Site Type by %ISA", 
               y = varlabel) +
          theme_minimal() +
          ylim((min(median_summary_isa$lower)-((max(median_summary_isa$upper)-min(median_summary_isa$lower))*0.5)),
             (max(median_summary_isa$upper)+(max(median_summary_isa$upper)-min(median_summary_isa$lower))*0.5))+
          theme(legend.position="none") +
          geom_text(aes(label = letter, y = upper), position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), hjust=0.5, vjust=0, size = 5, fontface = "bold") +
          annotate(geom = "text", x=0.5, y=Inf, size = 3, label=paste(
        "Distance from Edge: p",ifelse(ART_ANOVA$dfe[i]>0.001,paste("=",ART_ANOVA$dfe[i])," < 0.001 ***"),
        "\nUrban vs. Rural: p",ifelse(ART_ANOVA$urb_cat_isa[i]>0.001,paste("=",ART_ANOVA$urb_cat_isa[i])," < 0.001 ***"),
        "\nDfE X Urb. Cat.: p",ifelse(ART_ANOVA$int_isa[i]>0.001,paste("=",ART_ANOVA$int_isa[i])," < 0.001 ***")),
               hjust=0,
               vjust=1) +
          guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Distance\nFrom Edge (m)")) +
          theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
                panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
                axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
                aspect.ratio = 1,
                axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black"),
                axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black"))+
          scale_color_manual(values = c("grey","black","#A4DBE8"))
        
        fig_dist <-
          ggplot(median_summary_dist,mapping=aes(x=urb_cat_dist,y=var,col=dfe)) +
          geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), size = 3) +
          geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), 
                        width = 0.2, 
                        position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
          labs(title = NULL,
               x = "Site Type by Distance to Boston", 
               y = varlabel) +
          theme_minimal() +
          ylim((min(median_summary_dist$lower)-((max(median_summary_dist$upper)-min(median_summary_dist$lower))*0.5)),
             (max(median_summary_dist$upper)+(max(median_summary_dist$upper)-min(median_summary_dist$lower))*0.5))+
          theme(legend.position="none") +
          geom_text(aes(label = letter, y = upper), position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), hjust=0.5, vjust=0, size = 5, fontface = "bold") +
          annotate(geom = "text", x=0.5, y=Inf, size = 3, label=paste(
        "Distance from Edge: p",ifelse(ART_ANOVA$dfe[i]>0.001,paste("=",ART_ANOVA$dfe[i])," < 0.001 ***"),
        "\nUrban vs. Rural: p",ifelse(ART_ANOVA$urb_cat_dist[i]>0.001,paste("=",ART_ANOVA$urb_cat_dist[i])," < 0.001 ***"),
        "\nDfE X Urb. Cat.: p",ifelse(ART_ANOVA$int_dist[i]>0.001,paste("=",ART_ANOVA$int_dist[i])," < 0.001 ***")),
               hjust=0,
               vjust=1) +
          guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Distance\nFrom Edge (m)")) +
          theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
                panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
                axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
                aspect.ratio = 1,
                axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black"),
                axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black"))+
          scale_color_manual(values = c("grey","black","#A4DBE8"))
        
        fig_pub <- 
          ggplot(median_summary_isa,mapping=aes(x=urb_cat_isa,y=var,col=dfe)) +
          geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), size = 3) +
          geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper), 
                        width = 0.2, 
                        position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
          labs(title = vartitle,
               x = NULL, 
               y = varlabel) +
          theme_minimal() +
          geom_text(aes(label = letter, y = upper), position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), hjust=0.5, vjust=0, size = 5, fontface = "bold") +
          ylim((min(median_summary_isa$lower)-((max(median_summary_isa$upper)-min(median_summary_isa$lower))*0.5)),
             (max(median_summary_isa$upper)+(max(median_summary_isa$upper)-min(median_summary_isa$lower))*0.5))+
          theme(legend.position="none") +
          annotate(geom = "text", x=0.5, y=Inf, size = 3, label=paste(
        "Distance from Edge: p",ifelse(ART_ANOVA$dfe[i]>0.001,paste("=",ART_ANOVA$dfe[i])," < 0.001 ***"),
        "\nUrban vs. Rural: p",ifelse(ART_ANOVA$urb_cat_isa[i]>0.001,paste("=",ART_ANOVA$urb_cat_isa[i])," < 0.001 ***"),
        "\nDfE X Urb. Cat.: p",ifelse(ART_ANOVA$int_isa[i]>0.001,paste("=",ART_ANOVA$int_isa[i])," < 0.001 ***")),
               hjust=0,
               vjust=1) +
          guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Distance\nFrom Edge (m)")) +
          theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 18, hjust=0.5),
                panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
                panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
                axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
                aspect.ratio = 1,
                axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black"),
                axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black"))+
          scale_color_manual(values = c("grey","black","#A4DBE8"))
        
        
          
          # Printing
              figs <- plot_grid(fig_dist,fig_isa,legend,labels=NULL,ncol=3,rel_widths=c(1,1,0.3))
              
              figs_pub_medians[[leaf_var_unt]] <- fig_pub
              
              # printing figure
              setwd("/Users/emmadaily/BOSTON UNIVERSITY Dropbox/Emma Daily/Lab Files/Projects/UNE/Particulate Matter Project/Daily PM Analysis/RCode/LeafSEM/Figures/Categorical/ART ANOVA/Medians")
              
              ggsave(paste(leaf_var_unt,"_cat_ART.png"), plot = figs, width = 9,
                height = 4, bg = "white")
    
}
```
