```{r}
      # labs(title = "Ambient PM",
       # y = "relative abundance of \nlitter saprotrophs (%)")
```

### Loop for Figures (Medians jittered)
```{r}

    # defining lists of variable names
    leaf_vars_unt <- names(leafSEM_unt) 
    leaf_vars_norm <- names(leafSEM_normal)
    
    # defining lists to subset figures for publication
    figs_pub <- list()
    figs_pub_medians <- list()
    
for (i in 1:13) {
  
    # defining variables
    leaf_var_unt <- leaf_vars_unt[i]
    leaf_var_norm <- leaf_vars_norm[i]
    varlabel <- leafSEMnames[[leaf_var_unt]]
    vartitle <- leafSEMtitles[[leaf_var_unt]]
    
    # Medians
    
            # summarize the element by urbanization and distance from edge
            median_summary_isa <- cbind(aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites[[leaf_var_unt]],list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$urb_cat_isa,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=ci95_median_boot))
            median_summary_isa <- as.matrix(median_summary_isa)
            colnames(median_summary_isa) <- c("urb_cat_isa","dfe","var","lower","upper")
            median_summary_isa <- as.data.frame(median_summary_isa)
            median_summary_isa$var <- as.numeric(median_summary_isa$var)
            median_summary_isa$lower     <- as.numeric(median_summary_isa$lower)
            median_summary_isa$upper     <- as.numeric(median_summary_isa$upper)
    
            median_summary_dist <- cbind(aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites[[leaf_var_unt]],list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$urb_cat_dist,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=ci95_median_boot))
            median_summary_dist <- as.matrix(median_summary_dist)
            colnames(median_summary_dist) <- c("urb_cat_dist","dfe","var","lower","upper")
            median_summary_dist <- as.data.frame(median_summary_dist)
            median_summary_dist$var <- as.numeric(median_summary_dist$var)
            median_summary_dist$lower     <- as.numeric(median_summary_dist$lower)
            median_summary_dist$upper     <- as.numeric(median_summary_dist$upper)            
    
            
        # add in the significance letters, making sure the right groups correspond!
            
            median_summary_dist$letter <- NA
            median_summary_dist$letter[1] <- ART_ANOVA$RuralEdge_dist[i]
            median_summary_dist$letter[3] <- ART_ANOVA$RuralInterior_dist[i]
            median_summary_dist$letter[2] <- ART_ANOVA$UrbanEdge_dist[i]
            median_summary_dist$letter[4] <- ART_ANOVA$UrbanInterior_dist[i]
              
            median_summary_isa$letter <- NA
            median_summary_isa$letter[1] <- ART_ANOVA$RuralEdge_isa[i]
            median_summary_isa$letter[3] <- ART_ANOVA$RuralInterior_isa[i]
            median_summary_isa$letter[2] <- ART_ANOVA$UrbanEdge_isa[i]
            median_summary_isa$letter[4] <- ART_ANOVA$UrbanInterior_isa[i]
            
            # median_summary_dist$letter[1] <- letters_kw_dist$letters_kw_dist[1] # using letters from K-W
            # median_summary_dist$letter[2] <- letters_kw_dist$letters_kw_dist[3]
            # median_summary_dist$letter[3] <- letters_kw_dist$letters_kw_dist[2]
            # median_summary_dist$letter[4] <- letters_kw_dist$letters_kw_dist[4]
            
            # median_summary_isa$letter[1] <- letters_kw_isa$letters_kw_isa[1] # using letters from K-W
            # median_summary_isa$letter[2] <- letters_kw_isa$letters_kw_isa[3]
            # median_summary_isa$letter[3] <- letters_kw_isa$letters_kw_isa[2]
            # median_summary_isa$letter[4] <- letters_kw_isa$letters_kw_isa[4]
          
        
        fig_isa <- 
          ggplot(median_summary_isa,mapping=aes(x=urb_cat_isa,y=var,col=dfe)) +
          labs(title = " ",
               x = "Site Type by %ISA", 
               y = varlabel) +
          theme_minimal() +
          geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), size = 3) +
          geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
                      width = 0.2,
                      position = dodge,
                      linewidth = 1.2) +
        # Raw data points
          geom_point(
            data = LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites,
            aes(x = urb_cat_isa,
                y = .data[[leaf_var_unt]],
                col = dfe),
            position = position_jitterdodge(
              jitter.width = 0.15,
              dodge.width = 0.3
            ),
            alpha = 0.4,
            size = 1.5,
            inherit.aes = FALSE
          ) +
          ylim((min(median_summary_isa$lower)-((max(median_summary_isa$upper)-min(median_summary_isa$lower))*0.5)),
             (max(median_summary_isa$upper)+(max(median_summary_isa$upper)-min(median_summary_isa$lower))*0.5))+
          theme(legend.position="none") +
          geom_text(aes(label = letter, y = upper), position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), hjust=0.5, vjust=0, size = 5, fontface = "bold") +
          annotate(geom = "text", x=0.5, y=Inf, size = 3, label=paste(
        "Distance from Edge: p",ifelse(ART_ANOVA$dfe[i]>0.001,paste("=",ART_ANOVA$dfe[i])," < 0.001 ***"),
        "\nUrban vs. Rural: p",ifelse(ART_ANOVA$urb_cat_isa[i]>0.001,paste("=",ART_ANOVA$urb_cat_isa[i])," < 0.001 ***"),
        "\nDfE X Urb. Cat.: p",ifelse(ART_ANOVA$int_isa[i]>0.001,paste("=",ART_ANOVA$int_isa[i])," < 0.001 ***")),
               hjust=0,
               vjust=1) +
          guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Distance\nFrom Edge (m)")) +
          theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
                panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
                axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
                aspect.ratio = 1,
                axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black"),
                axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black"))+
          scale_color_manual(values = c("grey","black","#A4DBE8"))
        
        fig_dist <-
          ggplot(median_summary_dist,mapping=aes(x=urb_cat_dist,y=var,col=dfe)) +
          geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), size = 3) +
          geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
                      width = 0.2,
                      position = dodge,
                      linewidth = 1.2) +
        # Raw data points
          geom_point(
            data = LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites,
            aes(x = urb_cat_dist,
                y = .data[[leaf_var_unt]],
                col = dfe),
            position = position_jitterdodge(
              jitter.width = 0.15,
              dodge.width = 0.3
            ),
            alpha = 0.4,
            size = 1.5,
            inherit.aes = FALSE
          ) +
          labs(title = NULL,
               x = "Site Type by Distance to Boston", 
               y = varlabel) +
          theme_minimal() +
          ylim((min(median_summary_dist$lower)-((max(median_summary_dist$upper)-min(median_summary_dist$lower))*0.5)),
             (max(median_summary_dist$upper)+(max(median_summary_dist$upper)-min(median_summary_dist$lower))*0.5))+
          theme(legend.position="none") +
          geom_text(aes(label = letter, y = upper), position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), hjust=0.5, vjust=0, size = 5, fontface = "bold") +
          annotate(geom = "text", x=0.5, y=Inf, size = 3, label=paste(
        "Distance from Edge: p",ifelse(ART_ANOVA$dfe[i]>0.001,paste("=",ART_ANOVA$dfe[i])," < 0.001 ***"),
        "\nUrban vs. Rural: p",ifelse(ART_ANOVA$urb_cat_dist[i]>0.001,paste("=",ART_ANOVA$urb_cat_dist[i])," < 0.001 ***"),
        "\nDfE X Urb. Cat.: p",ifelse(ART_ANOVA$int_dist[i]>0.001,paste("=",ART_ANOVA$int_dist[i])," < 0.001 ***")),
               hjust=0,
               vjust=1) +
          guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Distance\nFrom Edge (m)")) +
          theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
                panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
                axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
                aspect.ratio = 1,
                axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black"),
                axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black"))+
          scale_color_manual(values = c("grey","black","#A4DBE8"))
        
        fig_pub <- 
          ggplot(median_summary_isa,mapping=aes(x=urb_cat_isa,y=var,col=dfe)) +
          geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), size = 3) +
          geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper),
                      width = 0.2,
                      position = dodge,
                      linewidth = 1.2) +
        # Raw data points
          geom_point(
            data = LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites,
            aes(x = urb_cat_dist,
                y = .data[[leaf_var_unt]],
                col = dfe),
            position = position_jitterdodge(
              jitter.width = 0.15,
              dodge.width = 0.3
            ),
            alpha = 0.4,
            size = 1.5,
            inherit.aes = FALSE
          ) +
          labs(title = vartitle,
               x = NULL, 
               y = varlabel) +
          theme_minimal() +
          geom_text(aes(label = letter, y = upper), position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), hjust=0.5, vjust=0, size = 5, fontface = "bold") +
          ylim((min(median_summary_isa$lower)-((max(median_summary_isa$upper)-min(median_summary_isa$lower))*0.5)),
             (max(median_summary_isa$upper)+(max(median_summary_isa$upper)-min(median_summary_isa$lower))*0.5))+
          theme(legend.position="none") +
          annotate(geom = "text", x=0.5, y=Inf, size = 3, label=paste(
        "Distance from Edge: p",ifelse(ART_ANOVA$dfe[i]>0.001,paste("=",ART_ANOVA$dfe[i])," < 0.001 ***"),
        "\nUrban vs. Rural: p",ifelse(ART_ANOVA$urb_cat_isa[i]>0.001,paste("=",ART_ANOVA$urb_cat_isa[i])," < 0.001 ***"),
        "\nDfE X Urb. Cat.: p",ifelse(ART_ANOVA$int_isa[i]>0.001,paste("=",ART_ANOVA$int_isa[i])," < 0.001 ***")),
               hjust=0,
               vjust=1) +
          guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Distance\nFrom Edge (m)")) +
          theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 18, hjust=0.5),
                panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
                panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
                axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
                aspect.ratio = 1,
                axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black"),
                axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black"))+
          scale_color_manual(values = c("grey","black","#A4DBE8"))
        
        
          
          # Printing
              figs <- plot_grid(fig_dist,fig_isa,legend,labels=NULL,ncol=3,rel_widths=c(1,1,0.3))
              
              figs_pub_medians[[leaf_var_unt]] <- fig_pub
              
              # printing figure
              setwd("/Users/emmadaily/BOSTON UNIVERSITY Dropbox/Emma Daily/Lab Files/Projects/UNE/Particulate Matter Project/Daily PM Analysis/RCode/LeafSEM/Figures/Categorical/ART ANOVA/Medians")
              
              ggsave(paste(leaf_var_unt,"_cat_ART_jit.png"), plot = figs, width = 9,
                height = 4, bg = "white")
    
}

```

### Generalized Linear Models
#### Transforming Variables for glms
```{r,eval=FALSE}
# Ethan Deyle advised the following for glms on these data:
  # for the perc_occluded variables, convert the percentages to proportions between 0 and 1 and use the binomial family
  # for wax, divide all observations by the max level (4) and use the binomial family
  # stomatal density was normally distributed, so I won't include it in this analysis
  # for the hyphal_conc and single_cell_density variables, use a glm with a poisson distribution (and ignore the warning)
  # for the four PM variables, try gaussian(link=log)
    # however, because I've already tried log-transforming the four PM variables to do a parametric analysis (which would follow a Gaussian distribution), I'm going to try a Gamma distribution

# first, I will transform the variables as needed and add them to the existing dataframe

    # transformed to proportion, to use a binomial distribution
    LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$prop_occluded <- (LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$perc_occluded)/100 
    LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$prop_occluded_PM <- (LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$perc_occluded_PM)/100
    LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$prop_occluded_hyphae <- (LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$perc_occluded_hyphae)/100
    LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$prop_occluded_single_cell <- (LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$perc_occluded_single_cell)/100
    LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$prop_occluded_other <- (LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$perc_occluded_other)/100
    LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$prop_wax <- (LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$wax)/4
```

#### glms
##### binomial family
```{r,eval=FALSE}
    # prop_occluded
```

##### poisson family
```{r, warning=FALSE,eval=FALSE}
    # hyphal_conc
    
      # Edge vs. Interior
      hyphal_conc_glm_EvI <- glm(hyphal_conc~dfe, data = LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites,family = poisson(link = "log"))
      summary(hyphal_conc_glm_EvI) # p = < 2e-16
    
      # Urban vs. Rural and Interaction Term (by distance from Boston)
      hyphal_conc_glm_dist <- glm(hyphal_conc~urb_cat_dist*dfe, data = LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites,family = poisson(link = "log"))
      summary(hyphal_conc_glm_dist)
      hyphal_conc_glm_dist_em <- emmeans(hyphal_conc_glm_dist,~urb_cat_dist*dfe)
      (pairs(hyphal_conc_glm_dist_em))
      cld(hyphal_conc_glm_dist_em, Letters = LETTERS)
    
    
      # Urban vs. Rural and Interaction Term (by %ISA)
      hyphal_conc_glm_isa <- glm(hyphal_conc~urb_cat_isa*dfe, data = LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites,family = poisson(link = "log"))
      summary(hyphal_conc_glm_isa)
      hyphal_conc_glm_isa_em <- emmeans(hyphal_conc_glm_isa,~urb_cat_isa*dfe) #pairwise comparisons
      pairs(hyphal_conc_glm_isa_em)
      cld(hyphal_conc_glm_isa_em, Letters = LETTERS)
      # Urban vs rural: p = 2e-16
      # Interaction Term: p = 8.5e-12
      
    # single_cell_density
    
      # Edge vs. Interior
      single_cell_density_glm_EvI <- glm(single_cell_density~dfe, data = LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites,family = poisson(link = "log"))
      summary(single_cell_density_glm_EvI) # p = < 2e-16
    
      # Urban vs. Rural and Interaction Term (by distance from Boston)
      single_cell_density_glm_dist <- glm(single_cell_density~urb_cat_dist*dfe, data = LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites,family = poisson(link = "log"))
      summary(single_cell_density_glm_dist)
      single_cell_density_glm_dist_em <- emmeans(single_cell_density_glm_dist,~urb_cat_dist*dfe)
      pairs(single_cell_density_glm_dist_em)
      cld(single_cell_density_glm_dist_em, Letters = LETTERS)
      # Urban vs rural: p = < 2e-16
      # Interaction Term: p = < 2e-16
    
      # Urban vs. Rural and Interaction Term (by %ISA)
      single_cell_density_glm_isa <- glm(single_cell_density~urb_cat_isa*dfe, data = LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites,family = poisson(link = "log"))
      summary(single_cell_density_glm_isa)
      single_cell_density_glm_isa_em <- emmeans(single_cell_density_glm_isa,~urb_cat_isa*dfe) #pairwise comparisons
      pairs(single_cell_density_glm_isa_em)
      # Urban vs rural: p = 2e-16
      # Interaction Term: p = 2e-16
      
      # Kruskall wallis gut check
      urban_dist <- subset(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites, urb_cat_dist=="Urban")
      kruskal.test(single_cell_density ~ dfe, data = urban_dist) 
      
      urban_isa <- subset(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites, urb_cat_isa=="Urban")
      kruskal.test(single_cell_density ~ dfe, data = urban_isa)
```

## Ambient PM w Open-Air Sampler Data
### PM2.5
#### Statistics
```{r}
# Testing for Normality

qqnorm(PassiveMassOpenxUNESites$PM2.5)
qqline(PassiveMassOpenxUNESites$PM2.5)

shapiro.test(PassiveMassOpenxUNESites$PM2.5) # p = 2.8e-05

# Transforming the Data

  ## original distribution:
  hist(PassiveMassOpenxUNESites$PM2.5)

  ambient_PM2.5_open_transform <- PassiveMassOpenxUNESites$PM2.5 # creates a new copy of the vector so we can get it ready to transform

  ## log transform
  # because we can't take the log of 0, we need to add 1 to all zero values of this data (log(1) is zero)
  ambient_PM2.5_open_log_transform <- ifelse(PassiveMassOpenxUNESites$PM2.5  == 0, 1, PassiveMassOpenxUNESites$PM2.5) # replaces all 0s with 1s  
  log_ambient_PM2.5_open <- log10(ambient_PM2.5_open_log_transform) # log transforms the data
  hist(log_ambient_PM2.5_open)
  shapiro.test(log_ambient_PM2.5_open) # p = 0.49. we will use this log-transformation

  ## square root transform
  sqrt_ambient_PM2.5_open <- sqrt(ambient_PM2.5_open_transform)
  hist(sqrt_ambient_PM2.5_open)
  shapiro.test(sqrt_ambient_PM2.5_open) # p = 0.0076

  ## inverse transform
  ambient_PM2.5_open_inv_transform <- PassiveMassOpenxUNESites$PM2.5 + 0.00001
  inv_ambient_PM2.5_open <- 1/ambient_PM2.5_open_inv_transform
  hist(inv_ambient_PM2.5_open)
  shapiro.test(inv_ambient_PM2.5_open) # p = 0.024

# ANOVA on transformed data
  
  # making a dataframe to store this data
      ambient_PM2.5open_pvals <- matrix(data=NA, nrow=2, ncol=6)
      colnames(ambient_PM2.5open_pvals) <- c("Analysis","Edge_vs_Interior","Urb_v_Rural_Dist","Interaction_Dist","Urb_v_Rural_ISA","Interaction_ISA" )
      ambient_PM2.5open_pvals[,1] <- c("Anova on Normalized Data","ART ANOVA")

    PassiveMassOpenxUNESites$log_PM2.5 <- log_ambient_PM2.5_open # to run an anova on the transformed variable, we must add it into the larger data frame
    
      # DFE: p = 0.054
      log_ambient_PM2.5_open_dfe_aov <- aov(log_ambient_PM2.5_open~dfe, data = PassiveMassOpenxUNESites)
      sum <- summary(log_ambient_PM2.5_open_dfe_aov)
      ambient_PM2.5open_pvals[1,2] <- sum[[1]]$`Pr(>F)`[1]
      
      # Urban vs. Rural (dist): p = 0.26
      log_ambient_PM2.5_open_dist_aov <- aov(log_ambient_PM2.5_open~urb_cat_dist, data = PassiveMassOpenxUNESites)
      sum <- summary(log_ambient_PM2.5_open_dist_aov)
      ambient_PM2.5open_pvals[1,3] <- sum[[1]]$`Pr(>F)`[1]
      
      # Interaction (dist): p = 0.059
      log_ambient_PM2.5_open_dist_aov <- aov(log_ambient_PM2.5_open~urb_cat_dist*dfe, data = PassiveMassOpenxUNESites)
      sum <- summary(log_ambient_PM2.5_open_dist_aov)
      ambient_PM2.5open_pvals[1,4] <- sum[[1]]$`Pr(>F)`[3]
    
      # Urban vs. Rural (ISA): p = 0.25
      log_ambient_PM2.5_open_isa_aov <- aov(log_ambient_PM2.5_open~urb_cat_isa, data = PassiveMassOpenxUNESites)
      sum <- summary(log_ambient_PM2.5_open_isa_aov)
      ambient_PM2.5open_pvals[1,5] <- sum[[1]]$`Pr(>F)`[1]
      
      # Interaction (ISA): p = 0.16
      log_ambient_PM2.5_open_isa_aov <- aov(log_ambient_PM2.5_open~urb_cat_isa*dfe, data = PassiveMassOpenxUNESites)
      sum <- summary(log_ambient_PM2.5_open_isa_aov)
      ambient_PM2.5open_pvals[1,6] <- sum[[1]]$`Pr(>F)`[3]
      
    # Pairwise Comparisons
      
      tuk_dist <- TukeyHSD(log_ambient_PM2.5_open_dist_aov, conf.level=.95)
      tuk_isa <- TukeyHSD(log_ambient_PM2.5_open_isa_aov, conf.level=.95)
      
        # calculating letters
            
            # Convert the interaction results to a dataframe
            tuk_isa_df <- as.data.frame(tuk_isa$`urb_cat_isa:dfe`)
            tuk_dist_df <- as.data.frame(tuk_dist$`urb_cat_dist:dfe`)
            
            # Move rownames (comparisons) into a column
            tuk_isa_df$Comparison <- rownames(tuk_isa_df)
            tuk_dist_df$Comparison <- rownames(tuk_dist_df)
            
            # Keep only what cldList needs
            tuk_isa_df_cld <- tuk_isa_df[, c("Comparison", "p adj")]
            tuk_dist_df_cld <- tuk_dist_df[, c("Comparison", "p adj")]
            
            # Rename columns to match cldList expectations
            colnames(tuk_isa_df_cld) <- c("Comparison", "p.value")
            colnames(tuk_dist_df_cld) <- c("Comparison", "p.value")
            tuk_isa_df_cld$Comparison <- gsub(":", "_", tuk_isa_df_cld$Comparison)
            tuk_dist_df_cld$Comparison <- gsub(":", "_", tuk_dist_df_cld$Comparison)
            
            # Generate letters
            letters_isa_norm <- cldList(p.value ~ Comparison, data = tuk_isa_df_cld)
            letters_dist_norm <- cldList(p.value ~ Comparison, data = tuk_dist_df_cld)
  
# ART ANOVA on untransformed data
  
    # DFE: p = 0.048
    ambient_PM2.5_open_dfe_aovART <- art(PM2.5~dfe, data = PassiveMassOpenxUNESites)
    sum <- anova(ambient_PM2.5_open_dfe_aovART)
    ambient_PM2.5open_pvals[2,2] <- sum$`Pr(>F)`

    # Urban vs. Rural (dist): p = 0.22
    ambient_PM2.5_open_dist_aovART <- art(PM2.5~urb_cat_dist, data = PassiveMassOpenxUNESites)
    sum <- anova(ambient_PM2.5_open_dist_aovART)
    ambient_PM2.5open_pvals[2,3] <- sum$`Pr(>F)`
    
    # Interaction (dist): p = 0.013
    ambient_PM2.5_open_dist_aovART <- art(PM2.5~urb_cat_dist*dfe, data = PassiveMassOpenxUNESites)
    sum <- anova(ambient_PM2.5_open_dist_aovART)
    ambient_PM2.5open_pvals[2,4] <- sum$`Pr(>F)`[3]
    
    # Urban vs. Rural (%ISA): p = 0.13
    ambient_PM2.5_open_isa_aovART <- art(PM2.5~urb_cat_isa, data = PassiveMassOpenxUNESites)
    sum <- anova(ambient_PM2.5_open_isa_aovART)
    ambient_PM2.5open_pvals[2,5] <- sum$`Pr(>F)`
    
    # Interaction (%ISA): p = 0.11
    ambient_PM2.5_open_isa_aovART <- art(PM2.5~urb_cat_isa*dfe, data = PassiveMassOpenxUNESites)
    sum <- anova(ambient_PM2.5_open_isa_aovART)
    ambient_PM2.5open_pvals[2,6] <- sum$`Pr(>F)`[3]
    
    # letters
    ambient_PM2.5_open_isa_aovARTcon <- art.con(ambient_PM2.5_open_isa_aovART,~urb_cat_isa*dfe, adjust="none")
    ambient_PM2.5_open_isa_aovARTcon <- as.data.frame(ambient_PM2.5_open_isa_aovARTcon)
    letters_isa <- cldList(
      p.value ~ contrast,
      data = ambient_PM2.5_open_isa_aovARTcon,
      threshold = 0.05)
      
    ambient_PM2.5_open_dist_aovARTcon <- art.con(ambient_PM2.5_open_dist_aovART,~urb_cat_dist*dfe, adjust="none")
    ambient_PM2.5_open_dist_aovARTcon <- as.data.frame(ambient_PM2.5_open_dist_aovARTcon)
    letters_dist <- cldList(
    p.value ~ contrast,
    data = ambient_PM2.5_open_dist_aovARTcon,
    threshold = 0.05)
    
# Kruskal-Wallis test with each group
    
    # creating a column with the groups "Rural0", "Rural90", "Urban0", "Urban90", "RuralOpen", and "UrbanOpen"
     PassiveMassOpenxUNESites$groupISA <- paste(PassiveMassOpenxUNESites$urb_cat_isa,PassiveMassOpenxUNESites$dfe)
     PassiveMassOpenxUNESites$groupDist <- paste(PassiveMassOpenxUNESites$urb_cat_dist,PassiveMassOpenxUNESites$dfe)
     
    # Kruskal-Wallis Test
          X_kw <- kruskal.test(PM2.5~groupISA, data = PassiveMassOpenxUNESites)
        
            # Dunn post-hoc pairwise
            dunn_res <- dunn_test(
                  data = PassiveMassOpenxUNESites,
                  PM2.5~groupISA,
                  p.adjust.method = "BH"
                )
           
            # Create named vector of adjusted p-values
            pvals <- dunn_res$p.adj
            names(pvals) <- paste(dunn_res$group1, dunn_res$group2, sep = "-")
            
            # Generate letters
            letters_kw_isa <- multcompLetters(pvals)$Letters
            letters_kw_isa <- as.data.frame(letters_kw_isa)
          
          X_kw <- kruskal.test(PM2.5~groupDist, data = PassiveMassOpenxUNESites)
        
            # Dunn post-hoc pairwise
            dunn_res <- dunn_test(
                  data = PassiveMassOpenxUNESites,
                  PM2.5~groupDist,
                  p.adjust.method = "BH"
                )
           
            # Create named vector of adjusted p-values
            pvals <- dunn_res$p.adj
            names(pvals) <- paste(dunn_res$group1, dunn_res$group2, sep = "-")
            
            # Generate letters
            letters_kw_dist <- multcompLetters(pvals)$Letters
            letters_kw_dist <- as.data.frame(letters_kw_dist)
    
# knitting all the letters into a single dataframe
   
    # isa
            
      ambient_PM2.5open_letters_isa <- matrix(data=NA, nrow=3, ncol=7)
      colnames(ambient_PM2.5open_letters_isa) <- c("Analysis",
                                                   "Rural0",
                                                   "Urban0",
                                                   "Rural90",
                                                   "Urban90",
                                                   "RuralOpen",
                                                   "UrbanOpen")
      ambient_PM2.5open_letters_isa[,1] <- c("Anova on Normalized Data","ART ANOVA","K-W")
      
    # ANOVA on normalized data
      
      letters_isa_norm$Letter[6] -> ambient_PM2.5open_letters_isa[1,2]
      letters_isa_norm$Letter[1] -> ambient_PM2.5open_letters_isa[1,3]
      letters_isa_norm$Letter[2] -> ambient_PM2.5open_letters_isa[1,4]
      letters_isa_norm$Letter[3] -> ambient_PM2.5open_letters_isa[1,5]
      letters_isa_norm$Letter[4] -> ambient_PM2.5open_letters_isa[1,6]
      letters_isa_norm$Letter[5] -> ambient_PM2.5open_letters_isa[1,7]
      
    # ART ANOVA
      
      letters_isa$Letter[1] -> ambient_PM2.5open_letters_isa[2,2]
      letters_isa$Letter[4] -> ambient_PM2.5open_letters_isa[2,3]
      letters_isa$Letter[2] -> ambient_PM2.5open_letters_isa[2,4]
      letters_isa$Letter[5] -> ambient_PM2.5open_letters_isa[2,5]
      letters_isa$Letter[3] -> ambient_PM2.5open_letters_isa[2,6]
      letters_isa$Letter[6] -> ambient_PM2.5open_letters_isa[2,7]
      
    # Kruskal Wallis Test
      
      letters_kw_isa$letters_kw_isa[1] -> ambient_PM2.5open_letters_isa[3,2]
      letters_kw_isa$letters_kw_isa[4] -> ambient_PM2.5open_letters_isa[3,3]
      letters_kw_isa$letters_kw_isa[2] -> ambient_PM2.5open_letters_isa[3,4]
      letters_kw_isa$letters_kw_isa[5] -> ambient_PM2.5open_letters_isa[3,5]
      letters_kw_isa$letters_kw_isa[3] -> ambient_PM2.5open_letters_isa[3,6]
      letters_kw_isa$letters_kw_isa[6] -> ambient_PM2.5open_letters_isa[3,7]
      
  # dist
            
      ambient_PM2.5open_letters_dist <- matrix(data=NA, nrow=3, ncol=7)
      colnames(ambient_PM2.5open_letters_dist) <- c("Analysis",
                                                   "Rural0",
                                                   "Urban0",
                                                   "Rural90",
                                                   "Urban90",
                                                   "RuralOpen",
                                                   "UrbanOpen")
      ambient_PM2.5open_letters_dist[,1] <- c("Anova on Normalized Data","ART ANOVA","K-W")
      
    # ANOVA on normalized data
      
      letters_dist_norm$Letter[6] -> ambient_PM2.5open_letters_dist[1,2]
      letters_dist_norm$Letter[1] -> ambient_PM2.5open_letters_dist[1,3]
      letters_dist_norm$Letter[2] -> ambient_PM2.5open_letters_dist[1,4]
      letters_dist_norm$Letter[3] -> ambient_PM2.5open_letters_dist[1,5]
      letters_dist_norm$Letter[4] -> ambient_PM2.5open_letters_dist[1,6]
      letters_dist_norm$Letter[5] -> ambient_PM2.5open_letters_dist[1,7]
      
    # ART ANOVA
      
      letters_dist$Letter[1] -> ambient_PM2.5open_letters_dist[2,2]
      letters_dist$Letter[4] -> ambient_PM2.5open_letters_dist[2,3]
      letters_dist$Letter[2] -> ambient_PM2.5open_letters_dist[2,4]
      letters_dist$Letter[5] -> ambient_PM2.5open_letters_dist[2,5]
      letters_dist$Letter[3] -> ambient_PM2.5open_letters_dist[2,6]
      letters_dist$Letter[6] -> ambient_PM2.5open_letters_dist[2,7]
      
    # Kruskal Wallis Test
      
      letters_kw_dist$letters_kw_dist[1] -> ambient_PM2.5open_letters_dist[3,2]
      letters_kw_dist$letters_kw_dist[4] -> ambient_PM2.5open_letters_dist[3,3]
      letters_kw_dist$letters_kw_dist[2] -> ambient_PM2.5open_letters_dist[3,4]
      letters_kw_dist$letters_kw_dist[5] -> ambient_PM2.5open_letters_dist[3,5]
      letters_kw_dist$letters_kw_dist[3] -> ambient_PM2.5open_letters_dist[3,6]
      letters_kw_dist$letters_kw_dist[6] -> ambient_PM2.5open_letters_dist[3,7]
    
# making our matrix of p-values into a dataframe with appropriate rounding
    
    # this is the matrix with p-values! now we make it into a data frame 
    ambient_PM2.5open_pvals <- as.data.frame(ambient_PM2.5open_pvals)
    
    # make sure all the numbers are classified as "numeric"
    ambient_PM2.5open_pvals[,2:8] <- lapply(ambient_PM2.5open_pvals[,2:6],as.numeric)
    
    # reduce all p-values in the matrix to two decimal points
    ambient_PM2.5open_pvals[] <- lapply(ambient_PM2.5open_pvals, function(x) if (is.numeric(x)) signif(x, digits = 2) else x)
    
```

```{r}
# Medians

    # summarize the element by urbanization and distance from edge
        median_summary_isa <- cbind(aggregate(PassiveMassOpenxUNESites$PM2.5,list(PassiveMassOpenxUNESites$urb_cat_isa,PassiveMassOpenxUNESites$dfe),FUN=ci95_median_boot))
        median_summary_isa <- as.matrix(median_summary_isa)
        colnames(median_summary_isa) <- c("urb_cat_isa","dfe","PM2.5","lower","upper")

        median_summary_isa$PM2.5 <- as.numeric(median_summary_isa$PM2.5)
        median_summary_isa$lower     <- as.numeric(median_summary_isa$lower)
        median_summary_isa$upper     <- as.numeric(median_summary_isa$upper)
    
        median_summary_dist <- cbind(aggregate(PassiveMassOpenxUNESites$PM2.5,list(PassiveMassOpenxUNESites$urb_cat_dist,PassiveMassOpenxUNESites$dfe),FUN=ci95_median_boot))
        median_summary_dist <- as.matrix(median_summary_dist)

        median_summary_dist <- as.data.frame(median_summary_dist)

      }
    
    ambient_PM2.5_open_urb_cat_isa_medians <-

    "\nDfE X Urb. Cat.: p",ifelse(ambient_PM2.5open_pvals$Interaction_ISA[1]>0.001,paste("=",ambient_PM2.5open_pvals$Interaction_ISA[1])," < 0.001 ***")),

      geom_text(aes(label = letter, y = PM2.5 + se), position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), hjust=0.5, vjust=0, size = 5, fontface = "bold") +
      annotate(geom = "text", x=0.5, y=Inf, size = 3, label=paste(
    "Distance from Edge: p",ifelse(ambient_PM2.5open_pvals$Edge_vs_Interior[1]>0.001,paste("=",ambient_PM2.5open_pvals$Edge_vs_Interior[1])," < 0.001 ***"),
    "\nUrban vs. Rural: p",ifelse(ambient_PM2.5open_pvals$Urb_v_Rural_Dist[1]>0.001,paste("=",ambient_PM2.5open_pvals$Urb_v_Rural_Dist[1])," < 0.001 ***"),
    "\nDfE X Urb. Cat.: p",ifelse(ambient_PM2.5open_pvals$Interaction_Dist[1]>0.001,paste("=",ambient_PM2.5open_pvals$Interaction_Dist[1])," < 0.001 ***")),
           hjust=0,
           vjust=1) +
      guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Distance\nFrom Edge (m)")) +
      theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
            panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
            axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
            aspect.ratio = 1,
            axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black"),
            axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black"))+
      scale_color_manual(values = c("grey","black","#A4DBE8"))
    
      
    # putting them both together
    
    ambient_PM2.5_open_cat_figs <- plot_grid(ambient_PM2.5_open_urb_cat_dist_means, ambient_PM2.5_open_urb_cat_isa_means,legendopen, labels=NULL,ncol=3,rel_widths=c(1,1,0.3))
    
    # printing figures
    
    setwd("/Users/emmadaily/BOSTON UNIVERSITY Dropbox/Emma Daily/Lab Files/Projects/UNE/Particulate Matter Project/Daily PM Analysis/RCode/LeafSEM/Figures/Categorical/Ambient Figs w Open")
    
    ggsave("ambient_PM2.5_open_cat_figs_mean.png", plot = ambient_PM2.5_open_cat_figs, width = 8,
      height = 4.5, bg = "white")
```

```{r}
        sum_log_ambient_PM2.5_open_urb_cat_dist$letter <- NA
        sum_log_ambient_PM2.5_open_urb_cat_dist$letter[1] <- letters_dist_norm$Letter[6]

        sum_log_ambient_PM2.5_open_urb_cat_dist$letter[4] <- letters_dist_norm$Letter[3]

        sum_log_ambient_PM2.5_open_urb_cat_dist$letter[6] <- letters_dist_norm$Letter[5]
        
        sum_log_ambient_PM2.5_open_urb_cat_isa$letter <- NA
        sum_log_ambient_PM2.5_open_urb_cat_isa$letter[1] <- letters_isa_norm$Letter[6]
        sum_log_ambient_PM2.5_open_urb_cat_isa$letter[2] <- letters_isa_norm$Letter[1]
        sum_log_ambient_PM2.5_open_urb_cat_isa$letter[3] <- letters_isa_norm$Letter[2]
        sum_log_ambient_PM2.5_open_urb_cat_isa$letter[4] <- letters_isa_norm$Letter[3]
        sum_log_ambient_PM2.5_open_urb_cat_isa$letter[5] <- letters_isa_norm$Letter[4]
        sum_log_ambient_PM2.5_open_urb_cat_isa$letter[6] <- letters_isa_norm$Letter[5]
        
  # calculating positions for the letters
      sum_log_ambient_PM2.5_open_urb_cat_dist$max <- NA
      sum_log_ambient_PM2.5_open_urb_cat_isa$max <- NA
      
      for (i in c(1:6)) {
      sum_log_ambient_PM2.5_open_urb_cat_dist$max[i] <- sum_log_ambient_PM2.5_open_urb_cat_dist$log_PM2.5[i]+
                                                        sum_log_ambient_PM2.5_open_urb_cat_dist$se[i]
      sum_log_ambient_PM2.5_open_urb_cat_isa$max[i] <- sum_log_ambient_PM2.5_open_urb_cat_isa$log_PM2.5[i]+
                                                        sum_log_ambient_PM2.5_open_urb_cat_isa$se[i]
      }

      log_ambient_PM2.5_open_urb_cat_dist <-
        ggplot(sum_log_ambient_PM2.5_open_urb_cat_dist,mapping=aes(x=urb_cat_dist,y=log_PM2.5,col=dfe)) +

             x = "Site Type by Distance from Boston", 
             y = expression("log(PM"[2.5]*" Concentration ("*mu*g/m^3*"))")) +
        theme_minimal() +   
        theme(legend.position="none") +
        geom_text(aes(label = letter, y = max), position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), hjust=0.5, vjust=0, size = 5, fontface = "bold") +
        guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Distance\nFrom Edge (m)")) +
        theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
              panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
              axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
              aspect.ratio = 1,
              axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black"),
              axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black"))+
        scale_color_manual(values = c("grey","black","#A4DBE8"))
      
      log_ambient_PM2.5_open_urb_cat_isa <-
        ggplot(sum_log_ambient_PM2.5_open_urb_cat_isa,mapping=aes(x=urb_cat_isa,y=log_PM2.5,col=dfe)) +
        geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), size = 3) +
        geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = log_PM2.5 - se, ymax = log_PM2.5 + se), 
                      width = 0.2, 
                      position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +
        labs(title = expression("PM"[2.5]),
             x = "Site Type by Distance from Boston", 
             y = expression("log(PM"[2.5]*" Concentration ("*mu*g/m^3*"))")) +
        theme_minimal() +   
        theme(legend.position="none") +
        geom_text(aes(label = letter, y = max), position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), hjust=0.5, vjust=0, size = 5, fontface = "bold") +
        guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Distance\nFrom Edge (m)")) +
        theme(panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
              panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
              axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
              aspect.ratio = 1,
              axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black"),
              axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black"))+
        scale_color_manual(values = c("grey","black","#A4DBE8"))
      
        
      # putting them both together
      
      log_ambient_PM2.5_open_cat_figs_means <- plot_grid(log_ambient_PM2.5_open_urb_cat_dist, log_ambient_PM2.5_open_urb_cat_isa, labels=NULL,ncol=2,rel_widths=c(1,1.45))
      
      # printing figures
      
      setwd("/Users/emmadaily/BOSTON UNIVERSITY Dropbox/Emma Daily/Lab Files/Projects/UNE/Particulate Matter Project/Daily PM Analysis/RCode/LeafSEM/Figures/Categorical")
      
      ggsave("log_ambient_PM2.5_open_cat_figs_means.png", plot = log_ambient_PM2.5_open_cat_figs_means, width = 7,
        height = 3, bg = "white")
```

```{r,eval=FALSE}
                            groupnames = c("dfe", "urb_cat_isa"))
ambient_PM10_open_urb_cat_isa <-
  ggplot(sum_ambient_PM10_open_urb_cat_isa,mapping=aes(x=urb_cat_isa,y=PM10,col=dfe)) +
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), size = 3) +

                width = 0.2, 
                position = position_dodge(width = 0.3)) +

       x = "Site Type (%ISA)", 
       y = expression("PM"[10]*"Concentration ("*mu*g/m^3*")"))+

# putting them both together

ambient_PM10_open_cat_figs <- plot_grid(ambient_PM10_open_urb_cat_dist, ambient_PM10_open_urb_cat_isa, labels=NULL,ncol=2,rel_widths=c(1,1.45))

# printing figures

setwd("/Users/emmadaily/BOSTON UNIVERSITY Dropbox/Emma Daily/Lab Files/Projects/UNE/Particulate Matter Project/Daily PM Analysis/RCode/LeafSEM/Figures/Categorical")

ggsave("ambient_PM10_open_cat_figs.png", plot = ambient_PM10_open_cat_figs, width = 7,
  height = 3, bg = "white")

# Testing for Normality

qqnorm(PassiveMassOpenxUNESites$PM10)
qqline(PassiveMassOpenxUNESites$PM10)

shapiro.test(PassiveMassOpenxUNESites$PM10) # p = 7.6e-07

# Transforming the Data

  ## original distribution:
  hist(PassiveMassOpenxUNESites$PM10)

  ambient_PM10_open_transform <- PassiveMassOpenxUNESites$PM10 # creates a new copy of the vector so we can get it ready to transform

  ## log transform
  # because we can't take the log of 0, we need to add 1 to all zero values of this data (log(1) is zero)
  ambient_PM10_open_log_transform <- ifelse(PassiveMassOpenxUNESites$PM10  == 0, 1, PassiveMassOpenxUNESites$PM10) # replaces all 0s with 1s  
  log_ambient_PM10_open <- log10(ambient_PM10_open_log_transform) # log transforms the data
  hist(log_ambient_PM10_open)
  shapiro.test(log_ambient_PM10_open) # p = = 0.00020

  ## square root transform
  sqrt_ambient_PM10_open <- sqrt(ambient_PM10_open_transform)
  hist(sqrt_ambient_PM10_open)
  shapiro.test(sqrt_ambient_PM10_open) # p = 1.2e-05

  ## inverse transform
  ambient_PM10_open_inv_transform <- PassiveMassOpenxUNESites$PM10 + 0.00001
  inv_ambient_PM10_open <- 1/ambient_PM10_open_inv_transform
  hist(inv_ambient_PM10_open)
  shapiro.test(inv_ambient_PM10_open) # p = 0.016

  # none of these transformations make the data normal
 
# ART ANOVA
  
  ## DFE
    ambient_PM10_open_dfe_aovART <- art(PM10~dfe, data = PassiveMassOpenxUNESites)
    anova(ambient_PM10_open_dfe_aovART)
    
    # DFE: p = 0.36
    
  ## DFE; Urban vs. Rural (by dist to Boston)
    ambient_PM10_open_dist_aovART <- art(PM10~urb_cat_dist*dfe, data = PassiveMassOpenxUNESites)
    anova(ambient_PM10_open_dist_aovART)
    
    # Urban vs. Rural (dist): p = 0.13
    # Interaction (dist): p = 0.11
    
    ambient_PM10_open_dist_aovARTcon <- art.con(ambient_PM10_open_dist_aovART,~urb_cat_dist*dfe, adjust="none")
    ambient_PM10_open_dist_aovARTcon <- as.data.frame(ambient_PM10_open_dist_aovARTcon)
  letters_dist <- cldList(
    p.value ~ contrast,
    data = ambient_PM10_open_dist_aovARTcon,
    threshold = 0.05)
    
  ## DFE; Urban vs. Rural (by %ISA)
    ambient_PM10_open_isa_aovART <- art(PM10~urb_cat_isa*dfe, data = PassiveMassOpenxUNESites)
    anova(ambient_PM10_open_isa_aovART)
    
    # Urban vs. Rural (%ISA): p = 0.77
    # Interaction (%ISA): p = 0.23
    
    ambient_PM10_open_isa_aovARTcon <- art.con(ambient_PM10_open_isa_aovART,~urb_cat_isa*dfe, adjust="none")
    ambient_PM10_open_isa_aovARTcon <- as.data.frame(ambient_PM10_open_isa_aovARTcon)
  letters_isa <- cldList(
    p.value ~ contrast,
    data = ambient_PM10_open_isa_aovARTcon,
    threshold = 0.05)
  
```

#### Summarizing the Data
```{r,eval=FALSE}
# To plot our 13 response variables against %ISA and Distance to Boston, we need to add those two parameters into the data frame including all our response variables.

# Summarizing the data (and calculating standard error) with Steve's function, for all 13 response variables

sum_perc_occluded_isa <- data_summary(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites,
                             varname = "perc_occluded",
                            groupnames = c("ISA", "dfe"))

sum_perc_occluded_PM_isa <- data_summary(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites,
                             varname = "perc_occluded_PM",
                            groupnames = c("ISA", "dfe"))

sum_perc_occluded_hyphae_isa <- data_summary(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites,
                             varname = "perc_occluded_hyphae",
                            groupnames = c("ISA", "dfe"))

sum_perc_occluded_single_cell_isa <- data_summary(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites,
                             varname = "perc_occluded_single_cell",
                            groupnames = c("ISA", "dfe"))

sum_perc_occluded_other_isa <- data_summary(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites,
                             varname = "perc_occluded_other",
                            groupnames = c("ISA", "dfe"))

sum_stomatal_density_isa <- data_summary(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites,

                            groupnames = c("ISA", "dfe"))

sum_hyphal_conc_isa <- data_summary(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites,

sum_single_cell_density_isa <- data_summary(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites,

sum_wax_isa <- data_summary(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites,
```

#### Figures
```{r,eval=FALSE}

# Making Figures for All 13 Variables by %ISA

perc_occluded_isa_line_plot <- ggplot(data=sum_perc_occluded_isa, aes(x=ISA,y=perc_occluded,
                                              group=dfe, color=dfe)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("grey","black")) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype=NULL), size = .75) +
  geom_point(aes(shape=NULL), size = 2.5) + 
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=perc_occluded - se, 
                    ymax=perc_occluded + se), width=2) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-1,30)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,100)) +
  theme(panel.background = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12), 
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12)) +
  theme(axis.line.x = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.line.y = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5)) +  
  guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Distance\nFrom Edge (m)")) +
  labs(x="%ISA (Impervious Surface Area)", y= expression("% Stomata Occluded")) +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14), axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14))

perc_occluded_PM_isa_line_plot <- ggplot(data=sum_perc_occluded_PM_isa, aes(x=ISA,y=perc_occluded_PM,
                                              group=dfe, color=dfe)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("grey","black")) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype=NULL), size = .75) +
  geom_point(aes(shape=NULL), size = 2.5) + 
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=perc_occluded_PM - se, 
                    ymax=perc_occluded_PM + se), width=2) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-1,30)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,70)) +
  theme(panel.background = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, linewidth = 1)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12), 
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12)) +
  theme(axis.line.x = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.line.y = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5)) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Distance\nFrom Edge (m)")) +
  labs(x="%ISA (Impervious Surface Area)", y= expression("% Stomata Occluded by PM")) +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14), axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14))

```

### Line Graphs by Distance from Boston
#### Summarizing the Data
```{r,eval=FALSE}
# Summarizing the data (and calculating standard error) with Steve's function, for all 13 response variables

sum_perc_occluded_dist <- data_summary(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites,
                             varname = "perc_occluded",
                            groupnames = c("distance_to_boston", "dfe"))

sum_perc_occluded_PM_dist <- data_summary(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites,
                             varname = "perc_occluded_PM",
                            groupnames = c("distance_to_boston", "dfe"))

sum_perc_occluded_hyphae_dist <- data_summary(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites,
                             varname = "perc_occluded_hyphae",
                            groupnames = c("distance_to_boston", "dfe"))

sum_perc_occluded_single_cell_dist <- data_summary(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites,
                             varname = "perc_occluded_single_cell",
                            groupnames = c("distance_to_boston", "dfe"))

sum_perc_occluded_other_dist <- data_summary(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites,
                             varname = "perc_occluded_other",
                            groupnames = c("distance_to_boston", "dfe"))

sum_stomatal_density_dist <- data_summary(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites,
                             varname = "stomatal_density",
                            groupnames = c("distance_to_boston", "dfe"))

sum_hyphal_conc_dist <- data_summary(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites,
                             varname = "hyphal_conc",
                            groupnames = c("distance_to_boston", "dfe"))

sum_single_cell_density_dist <- data_summary(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites,
                             varname = "single_cell_density",
                            groupnames = c("distance_to_boston", "dfe"))

sum_wax_dist <- data_summary(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites,
                             varname = "wax",
                            groupnames = c("distance_to_boston", "dfe"))

sum_foliar_PM2.5_dist <- data_summary(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites,
                             varname = "foliar_PM2.5",
                            groupnames = c("distance_to_boston", "dfe"))

sum_foliar_PM10_dist <- data_summary(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites,
                             varname = "foliar_PM10",
                            groupnames = c("distance_to_boston", "dfe"))

sum_ambient_PM2.5_dist <- data_summary(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites,
                             varname = "ambient_PM2.5",
                            groupnames = c("distance_to_boston", "dfe"))

sum_ambient_PM10_dist <- data_summary(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites,
                             varname = "ambient_PM10",
                            groupnames = c("distance_to_boston", "dfe"))
```
#### Figures
```{r,eval=FALSE}
# Making Figures for All 13 Variables by Distance to Boston

perc_occluded_dist_line_plot <- ggplot(data=sum_perc_occluded_dist, aes(x=distance_to_boston,y=perc_occluded,
                                              group=dfe, color=dfe)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("grey","black")) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype=NULL), size = .75) +
  geom_point(aes(shape=NULL), size = 2.5) + 
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=perc_occluded - se, 
                    ymax=perc_occluded + se), width=2) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-1,122)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,110)) +
  theme(panel.background = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 1)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12), 
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12)) +
  theme(axis.line.x = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.line.y = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5)) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Distance\nFrom Edge (m)")) +
  labs(x="Distance to Boston (km)", y= expression("% Stomata Occluded")) +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14), axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14))

        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12)) +
  theme(axis.line.x = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.line.y = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5)) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Distance\nFrom Edge (m)")) +
  labs(x="Distance to Boston (km)", y= expression("# Stomata per mm"^2*" Leaf Area")) +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14), axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14))

hyphal_conc_dist_line_plot <- ggplot(data=sum_hyphal_conc_dist, aes(x=distance_to_boston,y=hyphal_conc,group=dfe, color=dfe)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("grey","black")) +
  geom_line(aes(linetype=NULL), size = .75) +
  geom_point(aes(shape=NULL), size = 2.5) + 
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=hyphal_conc - se, 
                    ymax=hyphal_conc + se), width=2) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-1,122)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,100)) +
  theme(panel.background = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 1)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12), 
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12)) +
  theme(axis.line.x = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.line.y = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5)) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Distance\nFrom Edge (m)")) +
  labs(x="Distance to Boston (km)", y= expression("hyphae (nm/"*mu*"m"^-2* " leaf)")) +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14), axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14))

single_cell_density_dist_line_plot <- ggplot(data=sum_single_cell_density_dist, aes(x=distance_to_boston,y=single_cell_density,group=dfe, color=dfe)) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("grey","black")) +

                    ymax=single_cell_density + se), width=2) +
  scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-1,122)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0,5000)) +
  theme(panel.background = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 1)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12), 
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12)) +
  theme(axis.line.x = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),

  guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Distance\nFrom Edge (m)")) +
  labs(x="Distance to Boston (km)", y= expression("# single-cell microbes (mm"^-2*" leaf)")) +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14), axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14))
```

## Generalized Linear Models & Regression Figures (by %ISA)
### Checking Normality, Transforming Variables, Subsetting
```{r,eval=FALSE} 

# To make figures similar to figure 3 in Rindy et al 2021, we will plot each response variable by %ISA using a linear model

  # statistics used in these analyses are as follows:
    # normality check: p =  
        # checks for normality in the linear model to determine which model we should use for this
    # ISA x dfe: p =  
        # significance of the interactive effect between ISA and dfe on the response variable
    # lm for edge: p = , R^2 =, m = 
        # line of best fit for the edge sites, using glm or lm
    # lm for interior: p = , R^2 =, m =
        # line of best fit for the interior sites, using glm or lm


# First, we will check for normality on each response variable, to determine if a linear model is appropriate

perc_occludedISA.lm <- lm(perc_occluded~ISA,
                     data=LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites)
plot(perc_occludedISA.lm,pch=10,col='red')
shapiro.test(resid(perc_occludedISA.lm)) # p = 0.045

perc_occluded_PM_ISA.lm <- lm(perc_occluded_PM~ISA,
                     data=LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites)
plot(perc_occluded_PM_ISA.lm,pch=10,col='red')
shapiro.test(resid(perc_occluded_PM_ISA.lm)) # p = 0.46

perc_occluded_hyphae_ISA.lm <- lm(perc_occluded_hyphae~ISA,
                     data=LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites)
plot(perc_occluded_hyphae_ISA.lm,pch=10,col='red')
shapiro.test(resid(perc_occluded_hyphae_ISA.lm)) # p = 0.0004

perc_occluded_single_cell_ISA.lm <- lm(perc_occluded_single_cell~ISA,
                     data=LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites)
plot(perc_occluded_single_cell_ISA.lm,pch=10,col='red')
shapiro.test(resid(perc_occluded_single_cell_ISA.lm)) # p = 9.977e-08

perc_occluded_other_ISA.lm <- lm(perc_occluded_other~ISA,
                     data=LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites)
plot(perc_occluded_other_ISA.lm,pch=10,col='red')
shapiro.test(resid(perc_occluded_other_ISA.lm)) # p = 2.107e-07

stomatal_density_ISA.lm <- lm(stomatal_density~ISA,
                     data=LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites)
plot(stomatal_density_ISA.lm,pch=10,col='red')
shapiro.test(resid(stomatal_density_ISA.lm)) # p = 0.23

hyphal_conc_ISA.lm <- lm(hyphal_conc~ISA,
                     data=LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites)
plot(hyphal_conc_ISA.lm,pch=10,col='red')
shapiro.test(resid(hyphal_conc_ISA.lm)) # p = 0.0015

single_cell_density_ISA.lm <- lm(single_cell_density~ISA,
                     data=LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites)
plot(single_cell_density_ISA.lm,pch=10,col='red')
shapiro.test(resid(single_cell_density_ISA.lm)) # p = 4.6e-08

wax_ISA.lm <- lm(wax~ISA,
                     data=LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites)
plot(wax_ISA.lm,pch=10,col='red')
shapiro.test(resid(wax_ISA.lm)) # p = 0.046

foliar_PM2.5_ISA.lm <- lm(foliar_PM2.5~ISA,
                     data=LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites)
plot(foliar_PM2.5_ISA.lm,pch=10,col='red')
shapiro.test(resid(foliar_PM2.5_ISA.lm)) # p = 5.334e-08

foliar_PM10_ISA.lm <- lm(foliar_PM10~ISA,
                     data=LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites)
plot(foliar_PM10_ISA.lm,pch=10,col='red')
shapiro.test(resid(foliar_PM10_ISA.lm)) # p = 2.478e-06

ambient_PM2.5_ISA.lm <- lm(ambient_PM2.5~ISA,
                     data=LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites)
plot(ambient_PM2.5_ISA.lm,pch=10,col='red')
shapiro.test(resid(ambient_PM2.5_ISA.lm)) # p = 6.22e-05

ambient_PM10_ISA.lm <- lm(ambient_PM10~ISA,
                     data=LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites)
plot(ambient_PM10_ISA.lm,pch=10,col='red')
shapiro.test(resid(ambient_PM10_ISA.lm)) # p = 1.359e-06

# converting the percentage response variables (and wax) to proportions from 0 to 1, so we can use a binomial distribution for their glms
LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$prop_occluded <- 
    (LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$perc_occluded)/100
LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$prop_occluded_PM <- 
    (LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$perc_occluded_PM)/100
LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$prop_occluded_hyphae <- 
    (LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$perc_occluded_hyphae)/100
LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$prop_occluded_single_cell <- 
    (LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$perc_occluded_single_cell)/100
LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$prop_occluded_other <- 
    (LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$perc_occluded_other)/100
LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$prop_wax <- 
    (LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$wax)/4

# multiplying the foliar_PM2.5 values by 10000 so that they're all above 1, to be able to use the Gamma distribution

LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$foliar_PM2.5x10000 <- 
    (LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$foliar_PM2.5)*10000
LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$foliar_PM2.5x10000 <- 
    as.numeric(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$foliar_PM2.5x10000)

LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$foliar_PM10x10000 <- 
    (LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$foliar_PM10)*10000

# subsetting the edge and interior sites
  edge <- subset(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites, dfe=="0")
  interior <- subset(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites, dfe=="90")

```

### Stomatal Occlusion (all) 
```{r,eval=FALSE}
# Because these data had non-normally distributed residuals under a linear model, on Ethan's advice, we will use a glm with the binomial family

# Summarizing the data (and calculating standard error) with Steve's function

sum_perc_occluded <- data_summary(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites,
                             varname = "perc_occluded",
                            groupnames = c("ISA", "dfe"))


perc_occluded_isa_lm_fig <- ggplot(data=sum_perc_occluded,mapping=aes(x=ISA,y=perc_occluded,col=dfe)) +
  geom_smooth(method=lm,se=FALSE)+
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=perc_occluded - se, 
                    ymax=perc_occluded + se), width=1) +
  theme(panel.background = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 1)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12), 
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12)) +
  theme(axis.line.x = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.line.y = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5)) +
  ylim(0,100) +
  xlab("% ISA (Impervious Surface Area)") +
  ylab("% Stomata Occluded") +
  guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Distance\nFrom Edge (m)")) +
  theme(axis.title=element_text(size=15))+
  scale_color_manual(values=c("#999999", "#060000"))


# Interaction (ISA*dfe)

prop_occluded_ISAxdfe.glm <- glm(prop_occluded~ISA*dfe,
                   data=LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites,family=binomial(link = "logit"))
summary(prop_occluded_ISAxdfe.glm) # p = 0.91
plot(prop_occluded_ISAxdfe.glm)

# Statistics on edge leaves 

prop_occludedISAedge.glm <- glm(prop_occluded~ISA,
                   data=edge,family=binomial(link = "logit"))
summary(prop_occludedISAedge.glm) #p = 0.68 m = 0.02
1-(prop_occludedISAedge.glm$deviance/prop_occludedISAedge.glm$null.deviance) #R^2 = 0.0475
plot(prop_occludedISAedge.glm)

# Statistics on interior leaves
prop_occludedISAinterior.glm <- glm(prop_occluded~ISA,
                   data=interior,family=binomial(link = "logit"))
summary(prop_occludedISAinterior.glm) #p = 0.81 m = 0.012
1-(prop_occludedISAinterior.glm$deviance/prop_occludedISAinterior.glm$null.deviance) #R^2 = 0.016

# Statistics on combined edge & interior leaves  

prop_occludedISA.glm <- glm(prop_occluded~ISA,
                   data=LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites,family=binomial(link = "logit"))
summary(prop_occludedISA.glm) # p = 0.65 m = 0.016
1-(prop_occludedISA.glm$deviance/prop_occludedISA.glm$null.deviance) #R^2 = 0.029

```

```{r,eval=FALSE}
                   data=LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites)
```
