## Spearman Rank Correlation Tests
```{r,eval=FALSE}

# Single-cell Density & %ISA

    # Edge
    cor.test(x=LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$single_cell_density[LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe==0],
             y=LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$ISA[LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe==0],
             method = 'spearman')
    
    # Interior
    cor.test(x=LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$single_cell_density[LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe==90],
             y=LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$ISA[LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe==90],
             method = 'spearman')
    
    # All
    cor.test(x=LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$single_cell_density,
             y=LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$ISA,
             method = 'spearman')

# Stomatal Density & %ISA

    # Edge
    cor.test(x=LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$stomatal_density[LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe==0],
             y=LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$ISA[LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe==0],
             method = 'spearman')
    
    # Interior
    cor.test(x=LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$stomatal_density[LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe==90],
             y=LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$ISA[LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe==90],
             method = 'spearman')
    
    # All
    cor.test(x=LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$stomatal_density,
             y=LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$ISA,
             method = 'spearman')
```

## Foliar PM by Single-cell Microbes 
```{r,eval=FALSE}
sum_single_cell_foliar_PM2.5 <- data_summary(data = LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites,
                             varname = "single_cell_density",
                            groupnames = c("dfe","foliar_PM2.5"))


single_cell_foliar_PM2.5_fig <- ggplot(data=sum_single_cell_foliar_PM2.5,mapping=aes(x=foliar_PM2.5,y=single_cell_density,col=dfe)) +
  geom_smooth(method=lm,se=FALSE)+
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), size = 3) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=single_cell_density - se, 
                    ymax=single_cell_density + se), width=1) +
  theme(panel.background = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 1)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12), 
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12)) +
  theme(axis.line.x = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.line.y = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5)) +
  xlim(0,0.01)+
  xlab(expression(mu*"g PM "[2.5]*" cm"^-2*" leaf")) +
  ylab(expression("single-cell microbes (mm"^-2*" leaf)")) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Distance\nFrom Edge (m)")) +
  theme(axis.title=element_text(size=15))+
  scale_color_manual(values=c("#999999", "#060000"))

# printing figure
setwd("/Users/emmadaily/BOSTON UNIVERSITY Dropbox/Emma Daily/Lab Files/Projects/UNE/Particulate Matter Project/Daily PM Analysis/RCode/Microbial/Figures/")

ggsave("single_cell_foliar_PM2.5_fig.png", plot = single_cell_foliar_PM2.5_fig, width = 6,
  height = 6, bg = "white")

```

```{r,eval=FALSE}
summary(m_quad_edge)
```

## PM by Extent of Wax
```{r}
sum <- data_summary(data = LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites,
                             varname = "foliar_PM2.5",
                            groupnames = c("dfe","urb_cat_isa","wax"))

all <- cor.test(y=LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$foliar_PM2.5,x=LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$wax, method = 'spearman')
edge <- cor.test(y=LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$foliar_PM2.5[LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe == 0], x=LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$wax[LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe == 0], method = 'spearman')
interior <- cor.test(y=LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$foliar_PM2.5[LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe == 90], x=LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$wax[LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe == 90], method = 'spearman')

label <- paste0("Edge: rho = ",signif(edge$estimate, digits = 2),
                        ifelse(edge$p.value > 0.001,
                               paste(", p =",signif(edge$p.value,digits=2)), " , p < 0.001"),
                        "\nInterior: rho = ",signif(interior$estimate, digits = 2),
                        ifelse(interior$p.value > 0.001,
                               paste(", p =",signif(interior$p.value,digits=2)), " , p < 0.001"),
                        "\nAll: rho = ",signif(all$estimate, digits = 2),
                        ifelse(all$p.value > 0.001,
                               paste(", p =",signif(all$p.value, digits = 2)), " , p < 0.001")
                        )

fig <- ggplot(data=sum,mapping=aes(x=wax,y=foliar_PM2.5,col=dfe)) +
  geom_smooth(method=lm,se=FALSE, linetype="dashed")+
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), size = 3) +
  theme(panel.background = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 1)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12), 
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12)) +
  theme(axis.line.x = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.line.y = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5)) +
  ylab(expression(mu*"g PM "[2.5]*" cm"^-2*" leaf")) +
  xlab("Wax Extent (0-3)") +
  guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Distance\nFrom Edge (m)")) +
  theme(axis.title=element_text(size=15))+
  scale_color_manual(values=c("#999999", "#060000")) +
  geom_text(x = Inf, y = Inf, hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 4,
                      label = label, inherit.aes = FALSE)

fig <- ggplot(data=LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites,mapping=aes(x=wax,y=foliar_PM2.5,col=dfe)) +
  geom_smooth(method=lm,se=FALSE, linetype="dashed")+
  geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), size = 3) +
  theme(panel.background = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 1)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12), 
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12)) +
  theme(axis.line.x = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.line.y = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size=25),
        legend.position = "right",
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
        axis.line = element_line(colour = "black"),
        aspect.ratio = 1,
        axis.text.x = element_text(color = "black", size=15),
        axis.title.x = element_text(color = "black", size=15),
        axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black", size=15),
        axis.title.y = element_text(color = "black", size=15),
        axis.ticks = element_line(linewidth = 0.5),
        plot.margin = margin(10, 10, 10, 10)) +
  ylab(expression(mu*"g PM "[2.5]*" cm"^-2*" leaf")) +
  xlab("Wax Extent (0-3)") +
  guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Distance\nFrom Edge (m)")) +
  theme(axis.title=element_text(size=15))+
  scale_color_manual(values=c("#999999", "#060000"))+
  geom_text(x = Inf, y = Inf, hjust = 1, vjust = 1, size = 4,
                      label = label, inherit.aes = FALSE)

# printing figure
setwd("/Users/emmadaily/BOSTON UNIVERSITY Dropbox/Emma Daily/Lab Files/Projects/UNE/Particulate Matter Project/Daily PM Analysis/RCode/LeafSEM/Figures/Continuous/Regression Figures/Linear Regression")

ggsave("wax_foliar_PM2.5.png", plot = fig, width = 6,
  height = 6, bg = "white")
```

# NOx and O3 data from 2018-2019
## Reading in the NOX and O3 data
```{r}
  # Setting working directory
  setwd("/Users/emmadaily/BOSTON UNIVERSITY Dropbox/Emma Daily/Lab Files/Projects/UNE/Particulate Matter Project/Daily PM Analysis/RCode/NOx O3/csvs")

# reading in the data

    NOx <- read.csv("2018_2019_Nox_Variance.csv")
      NOx <- NOx[!is.na(NOx$NOx_ppb),]
      
    O3 <- read.csv("2018_2019_O3_Variance.csv")
      O3 <- O3[!is.na(O3$O3_ppb),]

# calculating means of NOx and O3 by site & dfe
      
  # NOx

    # taking the mean of each pair of samplers at each time     
    NOx_pair_means <- cbind(aggregate(NOx$NOx_ppb,list(NOx$site_code,NOx$Distance_From_Edge,NOx$Date_Installed,NOx$year),FUN=mean),
                        aggregate(NOx$NOx_ppb,list(NOx$site_code,NOx$Distance_From_Edge,NOx$Date_Installed,NOx$year),FUN=stderr))
    NOx_pair_means <- NOx_pair_means[,c(1:5,10)]
    colnames(NOx_pair_means) <- c("site_code","Distance_From_Edge","Date_Installed","year","mean_NOx_ppb","se_NOx_ppb")
    
    # selecting only the installation dates for June and July for both years
    
    NOx_pair_means <- subset(NOx_pair_means,Date_Installed=="19.07.18"|Date_Installed=="21.07.18"|Date_Installed=="24.07.18"|Date_Installed=="04.06.19"|Date_Installed=="05.06.19"|Date_Installed=="15.07.19"|Date_Installed=="17.07.19")
    
    # taking the mean of each sampler site over each year
    
    NOx_year_means <- cbind(aggregate(NOx_pair_means$mean_NOx_ppb,list(NOx_pair_means$site_code,NOx_pair_means$Distance_From_Edge,NOx_pair_means$year),FUN=mean),
                        aggregate(NOx_pair_means$se_NOx_ppb,list(NOx_pair_means$site_code,NOx_pair_means$Distance_From_Edge,NOx_pair_means$year),FUN=stderr))
    NOx_year_means <- NOx_year_means[,c(1:4,8)]
    colnames(NOx_year_means) <- c("site_code","Distance_From_Edge","year","mean_NOx_ppb","se_NOx_ppb")

    # taking the mean of each sampler site over both years
    
    NOx_site_dfe_means <- cbind(aggregate(NOx_year_means$mean_NOx_ppb,list(NOx_year_means$site_code,NOx_year_means$Distance_From_Edge),FUN=mean),
                        aggregate(NOx_year_means$se_NOx_ppb,list(NOx_year_means$site_code,NOx_year_means$Distance_From_Edge),FUN=stderr))
    NOx_site_dfe_means <- NOx_site_dfe_means[,c(1:3,6)]
    colnames(NOx_site_dfe_means) <- c("site_code","Distance_From_Edge","mean_NOx_ppb","se_NOx_ppb")
    
  # O3

    # taking the mean of each pair of samplers at each time     
    O3_pair_means <- cbind(aggregate(O3$O3_ppb,list(O3$site_code,O3$Distance_From_Edge,O3$Date_Installed,O3$year),FUN=mean),
                        aggregate(O3$O3_ppb,list(O3$site_code,O3$Distance_From_Edge,O3$Date_Installed,O3$year),FUN=stderr))
    O3_pair_means <- O3_pair_means[,c(1:5,10)]
    colnames(O3_pair_means) <- c("site_code","Distance_From_Edge","Date_Installed","year","mean_O3_ppb","se_O3_ppb")
    
    # selecting only the installation dates for June and July for both years
    
    O3_pair_means <- subset(O3_pair_means,Date_Installed=="18.07.18"|Date_Installed=="19.07.18"|Date_Installed=="21.07.18"|Date_Installed=="24.07.18"|Date_Installed=="04.06.19"|Date_Installed=="05.06.19"|Date_Installed=="15.07.19"|Date_Installed=="17.07.19")
    
    # taking the mean of each sampler site over each year
    
    O3_year_means <- cbind(aggregate(O3_pair_means$mean_O3_ppb,list(O3_pair_means$site_code,O3_pair_means$Distance_From_Edge,O3_pair_means$year),FUN=mean),
                        aggregate(O3_pair_means$se_O3_ppb,list(O3_pair_means$site_code,O3_pair_means$Distance_From_Edge,O3_pair_means$year),FUN=stderr))
    O3_year_means <- O3_year_means[,c(1:4,8)]
    colnames(O3_year_means) <- c("site_code","Distance_From_Edge","year","mean_O3_ppb","se_O3_ppb")

    # taking the mean of each sampler site over both years
    
    O3_site_dfe_means <- cbind(aggregate(O3_year_means$mean_O3_ppb,list(O3_year_means$site_code,O3_year_means$Distance_From_Edge),FUN=mean),
                        aggregate(O3_year_means$se_O3_ppb,list(O3_year_means$site_code,O3_year_means$Distance_From_Edge),FUN=stderr))
    O3_site_dfe_means <- O3_site_dfe_means[,c(1:3,6)]
    colnames(O3_site_dfe_means) <- c("site_code","Distance_From_Edge","mean_O3_ppb","se_O3_ppb")
    
    
# joining NOx and O3 datasets
    
    # creating a shared column for the merge
    
    NOx_site_dfe_means$code <- paste(NOx_site_dfe_means$site_code,NOx_site_dfe_means$Distance_From_Edge)
    O3_site_dfe_means$code <- paste(O3_site_dfe_means$site_code,O3_site_dfe_means$Distance_From_Edge)
    
    
    NOxO3 <- left_join(NOx_site_dfe_means,O3_site_dfe_means, by="code")
    NOxO3 <- NOxO3[,c(1:4,8:9)]
    colnames(NOxO3) <- c("site_code","dfe","mean_NOx_ppb","se_NOx_ppb","mean_O3_ppb","se_O3_ppb")

    
```

## Merging the PM & NOx/O3 Datasets
```{r}
# summarizing the PM data by site

  # because the ambient PM2.5, foliar PM2.5, and foliar PM10 data is normal when log-transformed, I will include both the untransformed and log-transformed versions of that data. 

  PM_pair_means <- cbind(# ambient
                          aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$ambient_PM2.5,list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$site_name,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=mean),
                          aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$ambient_PM2.5,list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$site_name,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=stderr),
                          aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$log_ambient_PM2.5,list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$site_name,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=mean),
                          aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$log_ambient_PM2.5,list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$site_name,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=stderr),
                          aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$ambient_PM10,list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$site_name,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=mean),
                          aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$ambient_PM10,list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$site_name,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=stderr),
                          # foliar
                          aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$foliar_PM2.5,list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$site_name,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=mean),
                          aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$foliar_PM2.5,list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$site_name,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=stderr),
                          aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$log_foliar_PM2.5,list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$site_name,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=mean),
                          aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$log_foliar_PM2.5,list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$site_name,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=stderr),
                          aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$foliar_PM10,list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$site_name,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=mean),
                          aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$foliar_PM10,list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$site_name,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=stderr),
                          aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$log_foliar_PM10,list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$site_name,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=mean),
                          aggregate(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$log_foliar_PM10,list(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$site_name,LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$dfe),FUN=stderr)
                          )

  PM_pair_means <- PM_pair_means[,c(1:3,6,9,12,15,18,21,24,27,30,33,36,39,42)]
  colnames(PM_pair_means) <- c("site_code","dfe",
                               "mean_ambient_PM2.5","se_ambient_PM2.5","mean_log_ambient_PM2.5","se_log_ambient_PM2.5","mean_ambient_PM10","se_ambient_PM10",
                               "mean_foliar_PM2.5","se_foliar_PM2.5","mean_log_foliar_PM2.5","se_log_foliar_PM2.5","mean_foliar_PM10","se_foliar_PM10","mean_log_foliar_PM10","se_log_foliar_PM10")
    
# joining the two datasets
  
  # creating new matching columns in both dataframes
  
  PM_pair_means$code <- paste(PM_pair_means$site_code,PM_pair_means$dfe)
  NOxO3$code <- paste(NOxO3$site_code,NOxO3$dfe)
  
  # joining the dataframes

  PM_pair_means <- PM_pair_means[,3:17]
  NOx_O3_PM <- left_join(NOxO3,PM_pair_means,by="code")
  NOx_O3_PM <- NOx_O3_PM[,c(1:2,7,3:6,8:21)]
  
  # pivoting longer to put PM size as a factor
  
  NOx_O3_PM <- NOx_O3_PM %>%
  pivot_longer(
    cols = c(mean_ambient_PM2.5, se_ambient_PM2.5, mean_log_ambient_PM2.5,se_log_ambient_PM2.5, mean_ambient_PM10, se_ambient_PM10,
             mean_foliar_PM2.5, se_foliar_PM2.5, mean_log_foliar_PM2.5,se_log_foliar_PM2.5, mean_foliar_PM10, se_foliar_PM10, mean_log_foliar_PM10, se_log_foliar_PM10),
    names_to = c(".value", "PM_size"),
    names_sep = "_PM"
  )

  NOx_O3_PM$dfe <- as.character(NOx_O3_PM$dfe)
  
   # adding a new column with urbanization category (urban or rural) by %ISA
  NOx_O3_PM$urb_cat_isa <- ifelse(NOx_O3_PM$site_code=="AA01"|NOx_O3_PM$site_code=="HW07"|NOx_O3_PM$site_code=="BM03"|NOx_O3_PM$site_code=="SW08","Urban","Rural") 
  
  # subsetting the edge and interior sites
  
  NOx_O3_PM_edge <- subset(NOx_O3_PM, dfe=="0")
  NOx_O3_PM_interior <- subset(NOx_O3_PM, dfe=="90")
  
  NOx_O3_PM_urban <- subset(NOx_O3_PM, urb_cat_isa=="Urban")
  NOx_O3_PM_rural <- subset(NOx_O3_PM, urb_cat_isa=="Rural")
  

  
```

```{r, eval = FALSE}
# scatter figures of untransformed data

ambient_vs_foliar_PM2.5_scatter_fig <- ggplot(foliar_PM2.5~ambient_PM2.5,data=LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites,mapping=aes(x=ambient_PM2.5,y=foliar_PM2.5,col=dfe)) +

        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12)) +

        axis.line.y = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5)) +

ambient_vs_foliar_PM10_scatter_fig <- ggplot(foliar_PM10~ambient_PM10,data=LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites,mapping=aes(x=ambient_PM10,y=foliar_PM10,col=dfe)) +

  theme(axis.line.x = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),

  xlab(expression("Ambient PM"[10]*" Concentration ("*mu*g/m^3*")")) +

# figure of log-transformed data

  # subsetting PM2.5
      NOx_O3_PM2.5 <- subset(NOx_O3_PM, PM_size=="2.5")
      
    # subsetting edge & interior
      NOx_O3_PM2.5_edge <- subset(NOx_O3_PM2.5, dfe=="0")
      NOx_O3_PM2.5_interior <- subset(NOx_O3_PM2.5, dfe=="90")  
        
  # linear model
  
    # log_fol & log_amb (with interaction)
  
      log_ambfolPM2.5.lm <- lm(mean_log_fol~mean_log_amb*dfe,
                                 data = NOx_O3_PM2.5)
      plot(log_ambfolPM2.5.lm,pch=10,col='red')
      shapiro.test(resid(log_ambfolPM2.5.lm)) # p = 0.73
      log_ambfolPM2.5.lm_sum <- summary(log_ambfolPM2.5.lm)  
      
    # log_fol & log_amb edge
  
      log_ambfolPM2.5_edge.lm <- lm(mean_log_fol~mean_log_amb,
                                 data = NOx_O3_PM2.5_edge)
      plot(log_ambfolPM2.5_edge.lm,pch=10,col='red')
      shapiro.test(resid(log_ambfolPM2.5_edge.lm)) 
      log_ambfolPM2.5_edge.lm_sum <- summary(log_ambfolPM2.5_edge.lm) 
      
    # log_fol & log_amb interior
  
      log_ambfolPM2.5_interior.lm <- lm(mean_log_fol~mean_log_amb,
                                 data = NOx_O3_PM2.5_interior)
      plot(log_ambfolPM2.5_interior.lm,pch=10,col='red')
      shapiro.test(resid(log_ambfolPM2.5_interior.lm)) 
      log_ambfolPM2.5_interior.lm_sum <-summary(log_ambfolPM2.5_interior.lm) 
      
  log_ambient_vs_foliar_PM2.5_fig <- ggplot(mean_log_fol~mean_log_amb,data=NOx_O3_PM2.5,mapping=aes(x=mean_log_amb,y=mean_log_fol,col=dfe)) +
    geom_smooth(method=lm,se=FALSE)+
    ylim(0,3.5)+
    geom_point(position = position_dodge(width = 0.3), size = 3) +
    theme(panel.background = element_blank(),
          panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 1)) +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12), 
          axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12)) +
    theme(axis.line.x = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
          axis.line.y = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5)) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=mean_log_fol - se_log_fol, ymax=mean_log_fol + se_log_fol),width=0.1) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(xmin=mean_log_amb - se_log_ambient, xmax=mean_log_amb + se_log_ambient), width=0.1) +
    annotate(geom = "text", x=0.5, y=3, size = 4, label=paste(
    "Edge: p",ifelse(log_ambfolPM2.5_edge.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_log_amb","Pr(>|t|)"]>0.001,
          paste("=",signif(log_ambfolPM2.5_edge.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_log_amb","Pr(>|t|)"],digits=3))," < 0.001"),
    "\nInterior: p",ifelse(log_ambfolPM2.5_interior.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_log_amb","Pr(>|t|)"]>0.001,paste("=",signif(log_ambfolPM2.5_interior.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_log_amb","Pr(>|t|)"],digits=3))," < 0.001"),
    "\nBoth: p",ifelse(log_ambfolPM2.5.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_log_amb","Pr(>|t|)"]>0.001,paste("=",signif(log_ambfolPM2.5.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_log_amb","Pr(>|t|)"],digits=3))," < 0.001"),
    "\nDistance From Edge x log Ambient PM2.5: p",ifelse(log_ambfolPM2.5.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_log_amb:dfe90","Pr(>|t|)"]>0.001,
          paste("=",signif(log_ambfolPM2.5.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_log_amb:dfe90","Pr(>|t|)"],digits=3))," < 0.001")),
    hjust=0,
    vjust=0) +
    ylab(expression("log(Foliar PM"[2.5]*" Density ("*mu*"g PM cm"^-2*" leaf)")) +
    xlab(expression("log(Ambient PM"[2.5]*" Concentration ("*mu*g/m^3*"))")) +
```

#### Statistics
```{r}
# we already know these variables have a non-normal distribution. however, by looking at our earlier attempts to transform them, we know that foliar_PM2.5, ambient_PM2.5, and foliar_PM10 are all normal after log transformation. I will try a simple linear model with both variables log-transformed.

# PM2.5

      # transforming the data
          foliar_PM2.5_log_transform <- ifelse(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$foliar_PM2.5  == 0, 1, LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$foliar_PM2.5) 
          LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$log_foliar_PM2.5 <- log10(foliar_PM2.5_log_transform) 
          hist(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$log_foliar_PM2.5)
          shapiro.test(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$log_foliar_PM2.5) # p = 0.25
              
          ambient_PM2.5_log_transform <- ifelse(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$ambient_PM2.5  == 0, 1, LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$ambient_PM2.5) 
          LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$log_ambient_PM2.5 <- log10(ambient_PM2.5_log_transform) 
          hist(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$log_ambient_PM2.5)
          shapiro.test(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites$log_ambient_PM2.5) # p = 0.59
            
      # subsetting edge vs interior
          edge <- subset(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites, dfe=="0")
          interior <- subset(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites, dfe=="90")
          
          urban <- subset(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites, urb_cat_isa=="Urban")
          rural <- subset(LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites, urb_cat_isa=="Rural")
        
  # simple linear model
        # all sites
          log_foliarvslog_ambient_PM2.5.lm <- lm(log_foliar_PM2.5~log_ambient_PM2.5,
                               data = LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites)
          plot(log_foliarvslog_ambient_PM2.5.lm,pch=10,col='red')
          shapiro.test(resid(log_foliarvslog_ambient_PM2.5.lm)) # p = 0.21
          summary(log_foliarvslog_ambient_PM2.5.lm)
                  
        # edge only
          log_foliarvsambient_log_PM2.5_edge.lm <- lm(log_foliar_PM2.5~log_ambient_PM2.5,
                               data = edge)
          plot(log_foliarvsambient_log_PM2.5_edge.lm,pch=10,col='red')
          shapiro.test(resid(log_foliarvsambient_log_PM2.5_edge.lm)) # p = 0.40
          summary(log_foliarvsambient_log_PM2.5_edge.lm) 
          
        # interior only
          foliarvsambient_PM2.5_interior.lm <- lm(log_foliar_PM2.5~log_ambient_PM2.5,
                               data = interior)
          plot(foliarvsambient_PM2.5_interior.lm,pch=10,col='red')
          shapiro.test(resid(foliarvsambient_PM2.5_interior.lm)) # p = 0.68
          summary(foliarvsambient_PM2.5_interior.lm) # p = 0.42
          
        # edge vs interior
          foliarvsambient_PM2.5_EvI.lm <- lm(log_foliar_PM2.5~log_ambient_PM2.5*dfe,
                               data = LeafSEM_resp_varsxUNESites)
          plot(foliarvsambient_PM2.5_EvI.lm,pch=10,col='red')
          shapiro.test(resid(foliarvsambient_PM2.5_EvI.lm)) # p = 0.22
          summary(foliarvsambient_PM2.5_EvI.lm) # p = 0.77

# Trying a quadratic model
          
m_quad_edge <- lm(log_foliar_PM2.5 ~ log_ambient_PM2.5 + I(log_ambient_PM2.5^2), data = edge)
summary(m_quad_edge)

m_quad_int <- lm(log_foliar_PM2.5 ~ log_ambient_PM2.5 + I(log_ambient_PM2.5^2), data = interior)
summary(m_quad_int)

m_quad_edge <- lm(log_foliar_PM2.5 ~ log_ambient_PM2.5 + I(log_ambient_PM2.5^2), data = urban)
summary(m_quad_edge)

m_quad_int <- lm(log_foliar_PM2.5 ~ log_ambient_PM2.5 + I(log_ambient_PM2.5^2), data = rural)
summary(m_quad_int)
          
```


### NOx vs O3
```{r}

# Pairwise comparisons between urban & rural NOx & O3

      NOx_dfe_aov <- aov(mean_NOx_ppb~dfe, data = NOx_O3_PM)
      NOx_dfe_tuk <- TukeyHSD(NOx_dfe_aov, conf.level=.95)
      NOx_dfe_tuk$dfe[4]

      NOx_urb_aov <- aov(mean_NOx_ppb~urb_cat_isa, data = NOx_O3_PM)
      NOx_urb_tuk <- TukeyHSD(NOx_urb_aov, conf.level=.95)
      
      O3_dfe_aov <- aov(mean_O3_ppb~dfe, data = NOx_O3_PM)
      O3_dfe_tuk <- TukeyHSD(O3_dfe_aov, conf.level=.95)

      O3_urb_aov <- aov(mean_O3_ppb~urb_cat_isa, data = NOx_O3_PM)
      O3_urb_tuk <- TukeyHSD(O3_urb_aov, conf.level=.95)
      
      
# linear model

  # all NOx & O3 (with interaction)

    NOx_O3.lm <- lm(mean_O3_ppb~mean_NOx_ppb*dfe,
                               data = NOx_O3_PM)
    #plot(NOx_O3.lm,pch=10,col='red')
    shapiro.test(resid(NOx_O3.lm)) 
    NOx_O3.lm_sum <- summary(NOx_O3.lm)  
    
  # NOx & O3 edge

    NOx_O3_edge.lm <- lm(mean_O3_ppb~mean_NOx_ppb,
                               data = NOx_O3_PM_edge)
    #plot(NOx_O3_edge.lm,pch=10,col='red')
    shapiro.test(resid(NOx_O3_edge.lm))  
    NOx_O3_edge.lm_sum <- summary(NOx_O3_edge.lm) 
    
  # NOx & O3 interior

    NOx_O3_interior.lm <- lm(mean_O3_ppb~mean_NOx_ppb,
                               data = NOx_O3_PM_interior)
    #plot(NOx_O3_interior.lm,pch=10,col='red')
    shapiro.test(resid(NOx_O3_interior.lm)) 
    NOx_O3_interior.lm_sum <-summary(NOx_O3_interior.lm) 
    
  # NOx & O3 all

    NOx_O3_all.lm <- lm(mean_O3_ppb~mean_NOx_ppb,
                               data = NOx_O3_PM)
    #plot(NOx_O3_all.lm,pch=10,col='red')
    shapiro.test(resid(NOx_O3_all.lm)) 
    NOx_O3_all.lm_sum <-summary(NOx_O3_all.lm) 

NOx_O3_dfe <-
  ggplot(data=NOx_O3_PM, mapping=aes(x=mean_NOx_ppb, y=mean_O3_ppb, col=dfe)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=mean_O3_ppb - se_O3_ppb, ymax=mean_O3_ppb + se_O3_ppb),width=0.5) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin=mean_NOx_ppb - se_NOx_ppb, xmax=mean_NOx_ppb + se_NOx_ppb), width=0.5) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  ylim(12,30) +
  geom_smooth(method=lm,se=FALSE)+
  theme(axis.title=element_text(size=15)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=c("grey", "black"),
                     labels = c("Edge","Interior")) +
  annotate(geom = "text", x=8, y=12, size = 7 , label=paste0(
    "Edge: p",ifelse(NOx_O3_edge.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_NOx_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"]>0.001,
          paste0(" = ",signif(NOx_O3_edge.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_NOx_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"],digits=2))," < 0.001"),
    "\nInterior: p",ifelse(NOx_O3_interior.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_NOx_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"]>0.001,paste0(" = ",signif(NOx_O3_interior.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_NOx_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"],digits=2))," < 0.001"),
    "\nBoth: p",ifelse(NOx_O3_all.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_NOx_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"]>0.001,paste0(" = ",signif(NOx_O3_all.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_NOx_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"],digits=2))," < 0.001"),
    "\nDistance From Edge x NOx: p",ifelse(NOx_O3.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_NOx_ppb:dfe90","Pr(>|t|)"]>0.001,
          paste0(" = ",signif(NOx_O3.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_NOx_ppb:dfe90","Pr(>|t|)"],digits=2))," < 0.001")),
    hjust=1,
    vjust=0) +
annotate(geom = "text", x=0.5, y=30, size = 7 , label=paste0(
      "NOx in Edge vs. Interior:",ifelse(NOx_dfe_tuk$dfe[4]>0.001,paste0(" = ",signif(NOx_dfe_tuk$dfe[4],digits=2))," < 0.001"),
    "\nO3 in Edge vs. Interior:",ifelse(O3_dfe_tuk$dfe[4]>0.001,paste0(" = ",signif(O3_dfe_tuk$dfe[4],digits=2))," < 0.001")),
    hjust=0,
    vjust=1) +
  theme(panel.background = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 1),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 25), 
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 25),
        axis.line.x = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.line.y = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 30),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 30), 
        title = element_text(size=16)) +
  labs(title="",x=expression("NO"[x]*" (ppb)"), y=expression("O"[3]*" (ppb)"),color="dfe") +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_text(size = 25), axis.title.y = element_text(size = 25)) +
  #guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Distance From Edge")) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

# printing the figure
  setwd("/Users/emmadaily/BOSTON UNIVERSITY Dropbox/Emma Daily/Lab Files/Projects/UNE/Particulate Matter Project/Daily PM Analysis/RCode/NOx O3/Figures")

  ggsave("NOx_O3_dfe.png", plot = NOx_O3_dfe, width = 9,
  height = 9, bg = "white")
  
  # linear model

  # all NOx & O3 (with interaction)

    NOx_O3.lm <- lm(mean_O3_ppb~mean_NOx_ppb*urb_cat_isa,
                               data = NOx_O3_PM)
    #plot(NOx_O3.lm,pch=10,col='red')
    shapiro.test(resid(NOx_O3.lm))  
    NOx_O3.lm_sum <- summary(NOx_O3.lm) 
    
  # NOx & O3 urban

    NOx_O3_urban.lm <- lm(mean_O3_ppb~mean_NOx_ppb,
                               data = NOx_O3_PM_urban)
    #plot(NOx_O3_urban.lm,pch=10,col='red')
    shapiro.test(resid(NOx_O3_urban.lm)) 
    NOx_O3_urban.lm_sum <- summary(NOx_O3_urban.lm)  
    
  # NOx & O3 rural

    NOx_O3_rural.lm <- lm(mean_O3_ppb~mean_NOx_ppb,
                               data = NOx_O3_PM_rural)
    #plot(NOx_O3_rural.lm,pch=10,col='red')
    shapiro.test(resid(NOx_O3_rural.lm))  
    NOx_O3_rural.lm_sum <-summary(NOx_O3_rural.lm) 
    
  # NOx & O3 all

    NOx_O3_all.lm <- lm(mean_O3_ppb~mean_NOx_ppb,
                               data = NOx_O3_PM)
    #plot(NOx_O3_all.lm,pch=10,col='red')
    shapiro.test(resid(NOx_O3_all.lm)) 
    NOx_O3_all.lm_sum <-summary(NOx_O3_all.lm) 

NOx_O3_urb <-
  ggplot(data=NOx_O3_PM, mapping=aes(x=mean_NOx_ppb, y=mean_O3_ppb, col=urb_cat_isa)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=mean_O3_ppb - se_O3_ppb, ymax=mean_O3_ppb + se_O3_ppb),width=0.5) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin=mean_NOx_ppb - se_NOx_ppb, xmax=mean_NOx_ppb + se_NOx_ppb), width=0.5) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  ylim(12,30) +
  geom_smooth(method=lm,se=FALSE,linetype="dashed")+
  theme(axis.title=element_text(size=15)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=c("#eab676", "#154c79"),
                     labels = c("Urban","Rural")) +
  annotate(geom = "text", x=8, y=12, size = 7 , label=paste0(
    "Urban: p",ifelse(NOx_O3_urban.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_NOx_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"]>0.001,
          paste0(" = ",signif(NOx_O3_urban.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_NOx_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"],digits=2))," < 0.001"),
    "\nRural: p",ifelse(NOx_O3_rural.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_NOx_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"]>0.001,paste0(" = ",signif(NOx_O3_rural.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_NOx_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"],digits=2))," < 0.001"),
    "\nBoth: p",ifelse(NOx_O3_all.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_NOx_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"]>0.001,paste0(" = ",signif(NOx_O3_all.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_NOx_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"],digits=2))," < 0.001"),
    "\nUrb. Cat. x NOx: p",ifelse(NOx_O3.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_NOx_ppb:urb_cat_isaUrban","Pr(>|t|)"]>0.001,
          paste0(" = ",signif(NOx_O3.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_NOx_ppb:urb_cat_isaUrban","Pr(>|t|)"],digits=2))," < 0.001")),
    hjust=1,
    vjust=0) +
    annotate(geom = "text", x=0.5, y=30, size = 7 , label=paste0(
      "NOx in Urban vs. Rural:",ifelse(NOx_urb_tuk$urb_cat_isa[4]>0.001,paste0(" = ",signif(NOx_urb_tuk$urb_cat_isa[4],digits=2))," < 0.001"),
    "\nO3 in Urban vs. Rural:",ifelse(O3_urb_tuk$urb_cat_isa[4]>0.001,paste0(" = ",signif(O3_urb_tuk$urb_cat_isa[4],digits=2))," < 0.001")),
    hjust=0,
    vjust=1) +
  theme(panel.background = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 1),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 25), 
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 25),
        axis.line.x = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.line.y = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 30),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 30), 
        title = element_text(size=16)) +
  labs(title="",x=expression("NO"[x]*" (ppb)"), y=expression("O"[3]*" (ppb)"),color="urb_cat_isa") +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_text(size = 25), axis.title.y = element_text(size = 25)) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")
    
# printing the figure
  setwd("/Users/emmadaily/BOSTON UNIVERSITY Dropbox/Emma Daily/Lab Files/Projects/UNE/Particulate Matter Project/Daily PM Analysis/RCode/NOx O3/Figures")

  ggsave("NOx_O3_urb.png", plot = NOx_O3_urb, width = 9,
  height = 9, bg = "white")
  
  
```

### NOx & O3 vs Ambient PM (transformed)
```{r}

# NOx & O3 vs Ambient PM2.5 (transformed)

      # subsetting PM2.5
          NOx_O3_PM2.5 <- subset(NOx_O3_PM, PM_size=="2.5")
          
        # subsetting edge & interior
          NOx_O3_PM2.5_edge <- subset(NOx_O3_PM2.5, dfe=="0")
          NOx_O3_PM2.5_interior <- subset(NOx_O3_PM2.5, dfe=="90")
          NOx_O3_PM2.5_urban <- subset(NOx_O3_PM2.5, urb_cat_isa=="Urban")
          NOx_O3_PM2.5_rural <- subset(NOx_O3_PM2.5, urb_cat_isa=="Rural")
          
    # NOx        
          
      # linear model
          
       # dfe
      
        # all & log_amb (with interaction)
      
          logambPM2.5_NOx.lm <- lm(mean_log_ambient~mean_NOx_ppb*dfe,
                                     data = NOx_O3_PM2.5)
          #plot(logambPM2.5_NOx.lm,pch=10,col='red')
          shapiro.test(resid(logambPM2.5_NOx.lm)) 
          logambPM2.5_NOx.lm_sum <- summary(logambPM2.5_NOx.lm)  
          
        # log_amb edge
      
          logambPM2.5_NOx_edge.lm <- lm(mean_log_ambient~mean_NOx_ppb,
                                     data = NOx_O3_PM2.5_edge)
          #plot(logambPM2.5_NOx_edge.lm,pch=10,col='red')
          shapiro.test(resid(logambPM2.5_NOx_edge.lm)) 
          logambPM2.5_NOx_edge.lm_sum <- summary(logambPM2.5_NOx_edge.lm)  
          
        # log_amb interior
      
          logambPM2.5_NOx_interior.lm <- lm(mean_log_ambient~mean_NOx_ppb,
                                     data = NOx_O3_PM2.5_interior)
          #plot(logambPM2.5_NOx_interior.lm,pch=10,col='red')
          shapiro.test(resid(logambPM2.5_NOx_interior.lm)) 
          logambPM2.5_NOx_interior.lm_sum <-summary(logambPM2.5_NOx_interior.lm)
          
        # log_amb all
      
          logambPM2.5_NOx_all.lm <- lm(mean_log_ambient~mean_NOx_ppb,
                                     data = NOx_O3_PM2.5)
          #plot(logambPM2.5_NOx_all.lm,pch=10,col='red')
          shapiro.test(resid(logambPM2.5_NOx_all.lm)) 
          logambPM2.5_NOx_all.lm_sum <-summary(logambPM2.5_NOx_all.lm) 
    
    NOx_log_ambient_PM2.5_dfe <-
      ggplot(data=NOx_O3_PM2.5, mapping=aes(x=mean_NOx_ppb, y=mean_ambient, col=dfe)) + 
      geom_point(size = 2.5) +
      geom_smooth(method=lm,se=FALSE,linetype="dashed")+
      ylim(0,50) +
      xlim(0.5,8.5) +
      geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=mean_ambient - se_ambient, ymax=mean_ambient + se_ambient),width=0.01) +
      geom_errorbar(aes(xmin=mean_NOx_ppb - se_NOx_ppb, xmax=mean_NOx_ppb + se_NOx_ppb), width=0.01) +
      annotate(geom = "text", x=0.5, y=38.5, size = 6, label=paste(
        "Edge: p",ifelse(logambPM2.5_NOx_edge.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_NOx_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"]>0.001,
              paste("=",signif(logambPM2.5_NOx_edge.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_NOx_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"],digits=2))," < 0.001"),
        "\nInterior: p",ifelse(logambPM2.5_NOx_interior.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_NOx_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"]>0.001,paste("=",signif(logambPM2.5_NOx_interior.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_NOx_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"],digits=2))," < 0.001"), 
        "\nBoth: p",ifelse(logambPM2.5_NOx_all.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_NOx_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"]>0.001,paste("=",signif(logambPM2.5_NOx_all.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_NOx_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"],digits=2))," < 0.001"),
        "\nDistance From Edge x NOx: p",ifelse(logambPM2.5_NOx.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_NOx_ppb:dfe90","Pr(>|t|)"]>0.001,
              paste("=",signif(logambPM2.5_NOx.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_NOx_ppb:dfe90","Pr(>|t|)"],digits=2))," < 0.001")),
        hjust=0,
        vjust=0) +
      theme(axis.title=element_text(size=15)) +
      scale_color_manual(values=c("grey", "black"),
                         labels = c("Edge","Interior"))+
      theme(panel.background = element_blank(),
            panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 1),

      theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) +
      theme(axis.title.x = element_text(size = 23), axis.title.y = element_text(size = 23)) +
      theme(legend.position = "none")

      annotate(geom = "text", x=14.5, y=39, size = 6, label=paste(
        "Urban: p",ifelse(logambPM2.5_O3_urban.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_O3_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"]>0.001,
              paste("=",signif(logambPM2.5_O3_urban.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_O3_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"],digits=2))," < 0.001"),
        "\nRural: p",ifelse(logambPM2.5_O3_rural.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_O3_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"]>0.001,paste("=",signif(logambPM2.5_O3_rural.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_O3_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"],digits=2))," < 0.001"), 
        "\nBoth: p",ifelse(logambPM2.5_O3_all.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_O3_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"]>0.001,paste("=",signif(logambPM2.5_O3_all.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_O3_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"],digits=2))," < 0.001"),
        "\nUrb. Cat. x O3: p",ifelse(logambPM2.5_O3.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_O3_ppb:urb_cat_isaUrban","Pr(>|t|)"]>0.001,
              paste("=",signif(logambPM2.5_O3.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_O3_ppb:urb_cat_isaUrban","Pr(>|t|)"],digits=2))," < 0.001")),
        hjust=0,
        vjust=0) +
      theme(axis.title=element_text(size=16)) +
      scale_color_manual(values=c("#eab676", "#154c79"),
                     labels = c("Urban","Rural")) +
      theme(panel.background = element_blank(),
            panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 1),
            axis.text.x = element_text(size = 22), 
            axis.text.y = element_text(size = 22),
            axis.line.x = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
            axis.line.y = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
            title = element_text(size=25))+
      labs(title=expression(""),
        x=expression("O"[3]*" (ppb)"), y=expression("Ambient PM"[2.5]*" Concentration ("*mu*g*" "*m^-3*")"),color="PM Type",) +
      theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) +
      theme(axis.title.x = element_text(size = 23), axis.title.y = element_text(size = 23)) +
      theme(legend.position = "none")

#---PM10 (not used)     
        
# subsetting PM10
      NOx_O3_PM10 <- subset(NOx_O3_PM, PM_size=="10")
      
    # subsetting edge & interior
      NOx_O3_PM10_edge <- subset(NOx_O3_PM10, dfe=="0")
      NOx_O3_PM10_interior <- subset(NOx_O3_PM10, dfe=="90")  
 
     
           
# NOx        
      
  # linear model
  
    # all  (with interaction)
  
      logfoliarPM10_NOx.lm <- lm(mean_log_foliar~mean_NOx_ppb*dfe,
                                 data = NOx_O3_PM10)
      #plot(logfoliarPM10_NOx.lm,pch=10,col='red')
      shapiro.test(resid(logfoliarPM10_NOx.lm)) 
      logfoliarPM10_NOx.lm_sum <- summary(logfoliarPM10_NOx.lm)  
      
    #  edge
  
      logfoliarPM10_NOx_edge.lm <- lm(mean_log_foliar~mean_NOx_ppb,
                                 data = NOx_O3_PM10_edge)
      #plot(logfoliarPM10_NOx_edge.lm,pch=10,col='red')
      shapiro.test(resid(logfoliarPM10_NOx_edge.lm)) 
      logfoliarPM10_NOx_edge.lm_sum <- summary(logfoliarPM10_NOx_edge.lm) 
      
    #  interior
  
      logfoliarPM10_NOx_interior.lm <- lm(mean_log_foliar~mean_NOx_ppb,
                                 data = NOx_O3_PM10_interior)
      #plot(logfoliarPM10_NOx_interior.lm,pch=10,col='red')
      shapiro.test(resid(logfoliarPM10_NOx_interior.lm)) 
      logfoliarPM10_NOx_interior.lm_sum <-summary(logfoliarPM10_NOx_interior.lm)  

NOx_log_foliar_PM10 <-
  ggplot(data=NOx_O3_PM10, mapping=aes(x=mean_NOx_ppb, y=mean_foliar, col=dfe)) + 
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  geom_smooth(method=lm,se=FALSE)+
  #ylim(0,3)+
  #xlim(-0.5,8)+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=mean_foliar - se_foliar, ymax=mean_foliar + se_foliar),width=0.01) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin=mean_NOx_ppb - se_NOx_ppb, xmax=mean_NOx_ppb + se_NOx_ppb), width=0.01) +
  annotate(geom = "text", x=-0.5, y=0.08 , size = 4, label=paste(
    "Edge: p",ifelse(logfoliarPM10_NOx_edge.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_NOx_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"]>0.001,
          paste("=",signif(logfoliarPM10_NOx_edge.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_NOx_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"],digits=3))," < 0.001"),
    "\nInterior: p",ifelse(logfoliarPM10_NOx_interior.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_NOx_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"]>0.001,paste("=",signif(logfoliarPM10_NOx_interior.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_NOx_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"],digits=3))," < 0.001"), 
    "\nBoth: p",ifelse(logfoliarPM10_NOx.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_NOx_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"]>0.001,paste("=",signif(logfoliarPM10_NOx.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_NOx_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"],digits=3))," < 0.001"),
    "\nDistance From Edge x \nNOx: p",ifelse(logfoliarPM10_NOx.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_NOx_ppb:dfe90","Pr(>|t|)"]>0.001,
          paste("=",signif(logfoliarPM10_NOx.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_NOx_ppb:dfe90","Pr(>|t|)"],digits=3))," < 0.001")),
    hjust=0,
    vjust=1) +
  theme(axis.title=element_text(size=15)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=c("grey", "black"),
                     labels = c("Edge","Interior"))+
  theme(panel.background = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 1)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 15), 
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15)) +
  theme(axis.line.x = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.line.y = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5)) +
  theme(title = element_text(size=16))+
  labs(title=expression("Foliar PM"[10]),x=expression("NO"[x]*" (ppb)"), y=expression("Foliar PM"[10]*"Concentration ("*mu*g*" "*m^-3*")")) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14), axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14)) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

# O3
  
  # linear model
  
    # all  (with interaction)
  
      logfoliarPM10_O3.lm <- lm(mean_log_foliar~mean_O3_ppb*dfe,
                                 data = NOx_O3_PM10)
      #plot(logfoliarPM10_O3.lm,pch=10,col='red')
      shapiro.test(resid(logfoliarPM10_O3.lm)) 
      logfoliarPM10_O3.lm_sum <- summary(logfoliarPM10_O3.lm)  
      
    #  edge

                                 data = NOx_O3_PM10_edge)
      #plot(logfoliarPM10_O3_edge.lm,pch=10,col='red')
      shapiro.test(resid(logfoliarPM10_O3_edge.lm)) 
      logfoliarPM10_O3_edge.lm_sum <- summary(logfoliarPM10_O3_edge.lm)  
      
    #  interior

                                 data = NOx_O3_PM10_interior)
      #plot(logfoliarPM10_O3_interior.lm,pch=10,col='red')
      shapiro.test(resid(logfoliarPM10_O3_interior.lm)) 
      logfoliarPM10_O3_interior.lm_sum <-summary(logfoliarPM10_O3_interior.lm)  
  
O3_log_foliar_PM10 <-
  ggplot(data=NOx_O3_PM10, mapping=aes(x=mean_O3_ppb, y=mean_foliar, col=dfe)) + 
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  geom_smooth(method=lm,se=FALSE)+
  #ylim(0,3)+
  #xlim(13,27)+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=mean_foliar - se_foliar, ymax=mean_foliar + se_foliar),width=0.01) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin=mean_O3_ppb - se_O3_ppb, xmax=mean_O3_ppb + se_O3_ppb), width=0.01) +
  annotate(geom = "text", x=13, y=0.08, size = 4, label=paste(
    "Edge: p",ifelse(logfoliarPM10_O3_edge.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_O3_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"]>0.001,
          paste("=",signif(logfoliarPM10_O3_edge.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_O3_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"],digits=3))," < 0.001"),
    "\nInterior: p",ifelse(logfoliarPM10_O3_interior.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_O3_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"]>0.001,paste("=",signif(logfoliarPM10_O3_interior.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_O3_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"],digits=3))," < 0.001"), 
    "\nBoth: p",ifelse(logfoliarPM10_O3.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_O3_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"]>0.001,paste("=",signif(logfoliarPM10_O3.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_O3_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"],digits=3))," < 0.001"),
    "\nDistance From Edge x \nO3: p",ifelse(logfoliarPM10_O3.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_O3_ppb:dfe90","Pr(>|t|)"]>0.001,
          paste("=",signif(logfoliarPM10_O3.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_O3_ppb:dfe90","Pr(>|t|)"],digits=3))," < 0.001")),
    hjust=0,
    vjust=1) +
  theme(axis.title=element_text(size=15)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=c("grey", "black"),
                     labels = c("Edge","Interior"))+
  theme(panel.background = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 1)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 15), 
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15)) +
  theme(axis.line.x = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.line.y = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5)) +
  theme(title = element_text(size=16))+
  labs(#title=expression("Foliar PM"[10]),
    x=expression("O"[3]*" (ppb)"), y=expression("Foliar PM"[10]*"Concentration ("*mu*g*" "*m^-3*")"),color="PM Type",) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14), axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14)) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

```

### NOx & O3 vs Foliar PM (transformed)
```{r}
  # subsetting PM2.5
      NOx_O3_PM2.5 <- subset(NOx_O3_PM, PM_size=="2.5")
      
    # subsetting edge & interior
      NOx_O3_PM2.5_edge <- subset(NOx_O3_PM2.5, dfe=="0")
      NOx_O3_PM2.5_interior <- subset(NOx_O3_PM2.5, dfe=="90") 
      NOx_O3_PM2.5_edge <- subset(NOx_O3_PM2.5, dfe=="0")
      NOx_O3_PM2.5_interior <- subset(NOx_O3_PM2.5, dfe=="90")  
      
# NOx        
      
  # linear model
  
    # all  (with interaction)
  
      logfoliarPM2.5_NOx.lm <- lm(mean_log_foliar~mean_NOx_ppb*dfe,
                                 data = NOx_O3_PM2.5)
      #plot(logfoliarPM2.5_NOx.lm,pch=10,col='red')
      shapiro.test(resid(logfoliarPM2.5_NOx.lm)) 
      logfoliarPM2.5_NOx.lm_sum <- summary(logfoliarPM2.5_NOx.lm)  
      
    #  edge
  
      logfoliarPM2.5_NOx_edge.lm <- lm(mean_log_foliar~mean_NOx_ppb,
                                 data = NOx_O3_PM2.5_edge)
      #plot(logfoliarPM2.5_NOx_edge.lm,pch=10,col='red')
      shapiro.test(resid(logfoliarPM2.5_NOx_edge.lm)) 
      logfoliarPM2.5_NOx_edge.lm_sum <- summary(logfoliarPM2.5_NOx_edge.lm) 
      
    #  interior
  
      logfoliarPM2.5_NOx_interior.lm <- lm(mean_log_foliar~mean_NOx_ppb,
                                 data = NOx_O3_PM2.5_interior)
      #plot(logfoliarPM2.5_NOx_interior.lm,pch=10,col='red')
      shapiro.test(resid(logfoliarPM2.5_NOx_interior.lm)) 
      logfoliarPM2.5_NOx_interior.lm_sum <-summary(logfoliarPM2.5_NOx_interior.lm)
      
    #  all
  
      logfoliarPM2.5_NOx_all.lm <- lm(mean_log_foliar~mean_NOx_ppb,
                                 data = NOx_O3_PM2.5)
      #plot(logfoliarPM2.5_NOx_all.lm,pch=10,col='red')
      shapiro.test(resid(logfoliarPM2.5_NOx_all.lm)) 
      logfoliarPM2.5_NOx_all.lm_sum <-summary(logfoliarPM2.5_NOx_all.lm)
      
NOx_log_foliar_PM2.5_dfe <-
  ggplot(data=NOx_O3_PM2.5, mapping=aes(x=mean_NOx_ppb, y=mean_foliar, col=dfe)) + 
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  geom_smooth(aes(linetype = dfe),method=lm,se=FALSE)+
      scale_linetype_manual(values = c("solid","dashed")) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=mean_foliar - se_foliar, ymax=mean_foliar + se_foliar),width=0.01) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin=mean_NOx_ppb - se_NOx_ppb, xmax=mean_NOx_ppb + se_NOx_ppb), width=0.01) +
  annotate(geom = "text", x=1, y=0.088 , size = 6, label=paste(
    "Edge: p",ifelse(logfoliarPM2.5_NOx_edge.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_NOx_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"]>0.001,
          paste("=",signif(logfoliarPM2.5_NOx_edge.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_NOx_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"],digits=2))," < 0.001"),
    "\nInterior: p",ifelse(logfoliarPM2.5_NOx_interior.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_NOx_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"]>0.001,paste("=",signif(logfoliarPM2.5_NOx_interior.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_NOx_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"],digits=2))," < 0.001"), 
    "\nBoth: p",ifelse(logfoliarPM2.5_NOx_all.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_NOx_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"]>0.001,paste("=",signif(logfoliarPM2.5_NOx_all.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_NOx_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"],digits=2))," < 0.001"),
    "\nDistance From Edge x NOx: p",ifelse(logfoliarPM2.5_NOx.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_NOx_ppb:dfe90","Pr(>|t|)"]>0.001,
          paste("=",signif(logfoliarPM2.5_NOx.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_NOx_ppb:dfe90","Pr(>|t|)"],digits=2))," < 0.001")),
    hjust=0,
    vjust=1) +
  theme(axis.title=element_text(size=15)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=c("grey", "black"),
                     labels = c("Edge","Interior"))+
  theme(panel.background = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 1),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 22), 
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 22),
        axis.line.x = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.line.y = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        title = element_text(size=25))+
  labs(title=expression("Foliar PM"[2.5]),x=expression("NO"[x]*" (ppb)"), y=expression("Foliar PM"[2.5]*" Concentration ("*mu*g*" "*m^-3*")")) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_text(size = 23), axis.title.y = element_text(size = 23)) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

    # linear models
          # all & log_amb (with interaction)
      
          logambPM2.5_NOx.lm <- lm(mean_log_foliar~mean_NOx_ppb*urb_cat_isa,
                                     data = NOx_O3_PM2.5)
          #plot(logambPM2.5_NOx.lm,pch=10,col='red')
          shapiro.test(resid(logambPM2.5_NOx.lm)) 
          logambPM2.5_NOx.lm_sum <- summary(logambPM2.5_NOx.lm)  
          
        # log_amb urban

    NOx_log_foliar_PM2.5_urb <-
      ggplot(data=NOx_O3_PM2.5, mapping=aes(x=mean_NOx_ppb, y=mean_foliar, col=urb_cat_isa)) + 
      geom_point(size = 2.5) +

      geom_errorbar(aes(xmin=mean_NOx_ppb - se_NOx_ppb, xmax=mean_NOx_ppb + se_NOx_ppb), width=0.01) +
      annotate(geom = "text", x=1, y=0.088, size = 6, label=paste(
        "Urban: p",ifelse(logambPM2.5_NOx_urban.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_NOx_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"]>0.001,
              paste("=",signif(logambPM2.5_NOx_urban.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_NOx_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"],digits=2))," < 0.001"),
        "\nRural: p",ifelse(logambPM2.5_NOx_rural.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_NOx_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"]>0.001,paste("=",signif(logambPM2.5_NOx_rural.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_NOx_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"],digits=2))," < 0.001"), 
        "\nBoth: p",ifelse(logfoliarPM2.5_NOx_all.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_NOx_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"]>0.001,paste("=",signif(logfoliarPM2.5_NOx_all.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_NOx_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"],digits=2))," < 0.001"),
        "\nUrb. Cat. x NOx: p",ifelse(logambPM2.5_NOx.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_NOx_ppb:urb_cat_isaUrban","Pr(>|t|)"]>0.001,
              paste("=",signif(logambPM2.5_NOx.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_NOx_ppb:urb_cat_isaUrban","Pr(>|t|)"],digits=2))," < 0.001")),
        hjust=0,
        vjust=1) +
      theme(axis.title=element_text(size=15)) +
      scale_color_manual(values=c("#eab676", "#154c79"),
                     labels = c("Urban","Rural")) +
      theme(panel.background = element_blank(),
            panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 1),
            axis.text.x = element_text(size = 22), 
            axis.text.y = element_text(size = 22),
            axis.line.x = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
            axis.line.y = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
            title = element_text(size=25))+
  labs(title=expression("Foliar PM"[2.5]),x=expression("NO"[x]*" (ppb)"), y=expression("Foliar PM"[2.5]*" Concentration ("*mu*g*" "*m^-3*")")) +
      theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) +
      theme(axis.title.x = element_text(size = 23), axis.title.y = element_text(size = 23)) +
      theme(legend.position = "none")

O3_log_foliar_PM2.5_dfe <-
  ggplot(data=NOx_O3_PM2.5, mapping=aes(x=mean_O3_ppb, y=mean_foliar, col=dfe)) + 
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  geom_smooth(method=lm,se=FALSE, linetype="dashed")+
  # ylim(0,3)+
  # xlim(13,27)+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=mean_foliar - se_foliar, ymax=mean_foliar + se_foliar),width=0.01) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin=mean_O3_ppb - se_O3_ppb, xmax=mean_O3_ppb + se_O3_ppb), width=0.01) +
  annotate(geom = "text", x=14.5, y=0.088 , size = 6, label=paste(
    "Edge: p",ifelse(logfoliarPM2.5_O3_edge.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_O3_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"]>0.001,
          paste("=",signif(logfoliarPM2.5_O3_edge.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_O3_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"],digits=2))," < 0.001"),
    "\nInterior: p",ifelse(logfoliarPM2.5_O3_interior.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_O3_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"]>0.001,paste("=",signif(logfoliarPM2.5_O3_interior.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_O3_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"],digits=2))," < 0.001"), 
    "\nBoth: p",ifelse(logfoliarPM2.5_O3_all.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_O3_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"]>0.001,paste("=",signif(logfoliarPM2.5_O3_all.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_O3_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"],digits=2))," < 0.001"),
    "\nDistance From Edge x O3: p",ifelse(logfoliarPM2.5_O3.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_O3_ppb:dfe90","Pr(>|t|)"]>0.001,
          paste("=",signif(logfoliarPM2.5_O3.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_O3_ppb:dfe90","Pr(>|t|)"],digits=2))," < 0.001")),
    hjust=0,
    vjust=1) +
  theme(axis.title=element_text(size=15)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=c("grey", "black"),
                     labels = c("Edge","Interior"))+
  theme(panel.background = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 1),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 22), 
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 22),
        axis.line.x = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.line.y = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        title = element_text(size=25))+
  labs(#title=expression("Foliar PM"[2.5]),
    x=expression("O"[3]*" (ppb)"), y=expression("Foliar PM"[2.5]*" Concentration ("*mu*g*" "*m^-3*")"),color="PM Type",) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_text(size = 23), axis.title.y = element_text(size = 23)) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")


# linear model
  
    # all  (with interaction)
  
      logfoliarPM2.5_O3.lm <- lm(mean_log_foliar~mean_O3_ppb*urb_cat_isa,
                                 data = NOx_O3_PM2.5)
      #plot(logfoliarPM2.5_O3.lm,pch=10,col='red')
      shapiro.test(resid(logfoliarPM2.5_O3.lm)) 
      logfoliarPM2.5_O3.lm_sum <- summary(logfoliarPM2.5_O3.lm)  
      
    #  urban
  
      logfoliarPM2.5_O3_urban.lm <- lm(mean_log_foliar~mean_O3_ppb,
                                 data = NOx_O3_PM2.5_urban)
      #plot(logfoliarPM2.5_O3_urban.lm,pch=10,col='red')
      shapiro.test(resid(logfoliarPM2.5_O3_urban.lm)) 
      logfoliarPM2.5_O3_urban.lm_sum <- summary(logfoliarPM2.5_O3_urban.lm) 
      
    #  rural
  
      logfoliarPM2.5_O3_rural.lm <- lm(mean_log_foliar~mean_O3_ppb,
                                 data = NOx_O3_PM2.5_rural)
      #plot(logfoliarPM2.5_O3_rural.lm,pch=10,col='red')
      shapiro.test(resid(logfoliarPM2.5_O3_rural.lm)) 
      logfoliarPM2.5_O3_rural.lm_sum <-summary(logfoliarPM2.5_O3_rural.lm) 
      
     #  all
  
      logfoliarPM2.5_O3_all.lm <- lm(mean_log_foliar~mean_O3_ppb,
                                 data = NOx_O3_PM2.5)
      #plot(logfoliarPM2.5_O3_all.lm,pch=10,col='red')
      shapiro.test(resid(logfoliarPM2.5_O3_all.lm)) 
      logfoliarPM2.5_O3_all.lm_sum <-summary(logfoliarPM2.5_O3_all.lm)
      
O3_log_foliar_PM2.5_urb <-
  ggplot(data=NOx_O3_PM2.5, mapping=aes(x=mean_O3_ppb, y=mean_foliar, col=urb_cat_isa)) + 
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  geom_smooth(method=lm,se=FALSE, linetype="dashed")+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=mean_foliar - se_foliar, ymax=mean_foliar + se_foliar),width=0.01) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin=mean_O3_ppb - se_O3_ppb, xmax=mean_O3_ppb + se_O3_ppb), width=0.01) +
  annotate(geom = "text", x=14.5, y=0.088 , size = 6, label=paste(
    "Urban: p",ifelse(logfoliarPM2.5_O3_urban.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_O3_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"]>0.001,
          paste("=",signif(logfoliarPM2.5_O3_urban.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_O3_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"],digits=2))," < 0.001"),
    "\nRural: p",ifelse(logfoliarPM2.5_O3_rural.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_O3_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"]>0.001,paste("=",signif(logfoliarPM2.5_O3_rural.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_O3_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"],digits=2))," < 0.001"), 
    "\nBoth: p",ifelse(logfoliarPM2.5_O3_all.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_O3_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"]>0.001,paste("=",signif(logfoliarPM2.5_O3_all.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_O3_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"],digits=2))," < 0.001"),
    "\nDistance From Edge x O3: p",ifelse(logfoliarPM2.5_O3.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_O3_ppb:urb_cat_isaUrban","Pr(>|t|)"]>0.001,
          paste("=",signif(logfoliarPM2.5_O3.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_O3_ppb:urb_cat_isaUrban","Pr(>|t|)"],digits=2))," < 0.001")),
    hjust=0,
    vjust=1) +
  theme(axis.title=element_text(size=15)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=c("#eab676", "#154c79"),
                     labels = c("Urban","Rural")) +
  theme(panel.background = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 1),
        axis.text.x = element_text(size = 22), 
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 22),
        axis.line.x = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.line.y = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        title = element_text(size=25))+
  labs(#title=expression("Foliar PM"[2.5]),
    x=expression("O"[3]*" (ppb)"), y=expression("Foliar PM"[2.5]*" Concentration ("*mu*g*" "*m^-3*")"),color="PM Type",) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_text(size = 23), axis.title.y = element_text(size = 23)) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

 # subsetting PM10
      NOx_O3_PM10 <- subset(NOx_O3_PM, PM_size=="10")
      
    # subsetting edge & interior
      NOx_O3_PM10_edge <- subset(NOx_O3_PM10, dfe=="0")
      NOx_O3_PM10_interior <- subset(NOx_O3_PM10, dfe=="90")  
      
# NOx

NOx_log_foliar_PM10 <-
  ggplot(data=NOx_O3_PM10, mapping=aes(x=mean_NOx_ppb, y=mean_foliar, col=dfe)) + 
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  geom_smooth(method=lm,se=FALSE)+
  #ylim(0,3)+
  #xlim(-0.5,8)+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=mean_foliar - se_foliar, ymax=mean_foliar + se_foliar),width=0.01) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin=mean_NOx_ppb - se_NOx_ppb, xmax=mean_NOx_ppb + se_NOx_ppb), width=0.01) +
  annotate(geom = "text", x=-0.5, y=0.08 , size = 4, label=paste(
    "Edge: p",ifelse(logfoliarPM10_NOx_edge.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_NOx_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"]>0.001,
          paste("=",signif(logfoliarPM10_NOx_edge.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_NOx_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"],digits=3))," < 0.001"),
    "\nInterior: p",ifelse(logfoliarPM10_NOx_interior.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_NOx_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"]>0.001,paste("=",signif(logfoliarPM10_NOx_interior.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_NOx_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"],digits=3))," < 0.001"), 
    "\nBoth: p",ifelse(logfoliarPM10_NOx.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_NOx_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"]>0.001,paste("=",signif(logfoliarPM10_NOx.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_NOx_ppb","Pr(>|t|)"],digits=3))," < 0.001"),
    "\nDistance From Edge x \nNOx: p",ifelse(logfoliarPM10_NOx.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_NOx_ppb:dfe90","Pr(>|t|)"]>0.001,
          paste("=",signif(logfoliarPM10_NOx.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_NOx_ppb:dfe90","Pr(>|t|)"],digits=3))," < 0.001")),
    hjust=0,
    vjust=1) +
  theme(axis.title=element_text(size=15)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=c("grey", "black"),
                     labels = c("Edge","Interior"))+
  theme(panel.background = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 1)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 15), 
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15)) +
  theme(axis.line.x = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.line.y = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5)) +
  theme(title = element_text(size=16))+
  labs(title=expression("Foliar PM"[10]),x=expression("NO"[x]*" (ppb)"), y=expression("Foliar PM"[10]*"Concentration ("*mu*g*" "*m^-3*")")) +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14), axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14)) +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

          paste("=",signif(logfoliarPM10_O3.lm_sum$coefficients["mean_O3_ppb:dfe90","Pr(>|t|)"],digits=3))," < 0.001")),
    hjust=0,
```

### NOx & O3 vs Ambient PM (untransformed)
```{r}
NOx_ambient_PM2.5 <-
  ggplot(data=NOx_O3_PM2.5, mapping=aes(x=mean_NOx_ppb, y=mean_ambient, col=dfe)) + 
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  geom_smooth(method=lm,se=FALSE)+
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin=mean_ambient - se_ambient, ymax=mean_ambient + se_ambient), width=1) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(xmin=mean_NOx_ppb - se_NOx_ppb, xmax=mean_NOx_ppb + se_NOx_ppb), width=1) +
  theme(axis.title=element_text(size=15)) +
  scale_color_manual(values=c("grey", "black"),
                     labels = c("Edge","Interior"))+
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(16, 17),
                     labels = c(expression("PM"[2.5]), expression("PM"[10]))) +
  theme(panel.background = element_blank(),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 1)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 15), 
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 15)) +
  theme(axis.line.x = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5),
        axis.line.y = element_line(color = "black", linewidth = 0.5)) +
  theme(title = element_text(size=16))+
  theme(plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)) +
  labs(title=expression("Ambient PM"[2.5]),x=expression("NO"[x]*" (ppb)"), y= expression("Ambient PM"[2.5]*" Concentration ("*mu*g*" "*m^-3*")")) +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14), axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14)) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Distance From Edge"))+
  theme(legend.position = "none")
```
